summary: Recent studies suggest that child-directed speech is not conducive to language learning in BabyLMs. However, current evaluations focus predominantly on comprehension and not production, which is central to usage-based theories of language acquisition which argue how CDS facilitates early language use through constructional ''frames'' (frequent lexical patterns with open slots). We introduce a novel generation-based evaluation inspired by such theories in form of a frame-completion task, and compare Llama models trained with CDS, the BabyLM corpus, and web-crawl data (FineWeb-edu) on comprehension benchmarks and our novel framework. Our results reveal a clear dissociation between models' comprehension and production capabilities: while FineWeb-trained models excel at minimal pairs, CDS-trained models produce grammatical completions substantially earlier in training and concentrate probability mass on appropriate slot-fillers. These findings show that comprehension benchmarks underestimate what CDS affords to BabyLMs.

AI.tldr: 近期研究表明，儿童导向语言（CDS）对BabyLM的语言学习并非有利，但现有评估偏重理解而非产出。本文提出基于生成的框架补全任务，发现CDS训练的模型在语法产出上更早成功，而网页数据训练的模型在理解基准上表现更好，揭示了理解基准低估了CDS的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为CDS对BabyLM语言学习无益，但评估仅关注理解能力，忽视了语言产出在语言习得理论中的重要性，尤其是基于使用的理论认为CDS通过"框架"结构促进早期语言使用。
AI.method: 提出一种基于生成的框架补全任务（frame-completion task），比较使用CDS、BabyLM语料库和网页数据（FineWeb-edu）训练的Llama模型在理解基准和该新框架上的表现。
AI.result: 发现理解与产出能力之间存在明显分离：网页数据训练的模型在最小对测试中表现优异，而CDS训练的模型在训练早期就能产生语法正确的补全，并将概率质量集中在适当的槽位填充词上。
AI.conclusion: 单纯的理解基准低估了CDS对BabyLM的贡献，CDS在语言产出方面具有独特优势，支持了基于使用的语言习得理论。

title: MM-Snowball: Evaluating and Mitigating Hallucination Snowballing in Multimodal Multi-Turn Dialogue
comment: Accepted by The International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate remarkable visual understanding, yet their reliability in interactive settings is severely undermined by hallucination snowballing: a phenomenon where initial errors amplify across conversational turns, leading to a collapse in coherence. This failure reveals a fundamental vulnerability where models progressively neglect visual grounding in favor of over-relying on polluted textual history. Existing benchmarks are predominantly confined to single-turn VQA, which fail to capture the complex dynamics of error propagation in long-horizon interactions. To address this, we introduce MM-Snowball, the first benchmark for fine-grained diagnosis of hallucination snowballing within dialogues. Extensive evaluation shows that our benchmark poses a significant challenge even to advanced MLLMs and reveals the inefficacy of existing mitigation methods designed for single-turn VQA. To counteract this degradation, we propose Conflict-Aware Visual Rectification (CAVR). This training-free method mitigates snowballing through a synergistic dual-mechanism that refreshes visual grounding at the representation level and rectifies output distributions at the logit level, effectively re-anchoring the model to visual facts. Experiments demonstrate that CAVR achieves state-of-the-art performance, offering a promising path toward more reliable interactive AI. Data and code are available at: https://frenkie-chiang.github.io/MM-Snowball

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-Snowball基准，用于诊断多模态大模型在对话中的\"幻觉雪崩\"现象，并提出CAVR方法通过视觉锚定和输出修正来缓解此问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在交互场景中存在幻觉雪崩问题——初始错误在对话中不断放大，导致模型逐渐忽视视觉信息而过度依赖被污染的历史文本。现有基准局限于单轮VQA，无法捕捉长程交互中的错误传播动态。
AI.method: 1) 构建MM-Snowball基准，用于细粒度诊断对话中的幻觉雪崩现象；2) 提出Conflict-Aware Visual Rectification (CAVR)方法，通过表示层刷新视觉锚定和logit层修正输出分布的双机制协同工作，无需训练。
AI.result: MM-Snowball对先进MLLMs构成显著挑战，现有单轮VQA缓解方法无效；CAVR方法达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CAVR通过重新锚定模型到视觉事实，有效缓解对话中的幻觉雪崩，为构建更可靠的交互式AI提供了有前景的路径。

title: Before the Model Learns the Bug:Fuzzing RLVR Verifiers
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) replaces human preference labels with executable reward functions such as math answer checkers, JSON tool-call validators, and code unit-test harnesses. That makes the reward partly a software artifact: if the verifier is wrong, optimization can learn the bug. We study this failure mode with a lightweight verifier-fuzzing framework that generates adversarial completions, compares buggy and stricter reference verifiers, logs paired decisions, and reports false-positive, false-negative, disagreement, exploit, and uncertainty metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个轻量级验证器模糊测试框架，用于检测RLVR中因验证器错误导致的优化漏洞，并报告多种质量指标。
AI.motivation: RLVR将奖励函数部分作为软件工件，若验证器存在错误，强化学习优化过程可能利用这些错误（即"学习bug"），导致模型行为偏离预期。
AI.method: 提出了一个轻量级验证器模糊测试框架，通过生成对抗性补全、对比有缺陷的验证器与更严格的参考验证器、记录成对决策，并报告假阳性、假阴性、不一致、可利用性和不确定性等指标。
AI.result: 该框架能够有效检测验证器中的错误，并量化其对RLVR训练质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 验证器作为软件工件的正确性至关重要，该模糊测试框架有助于在部署前发现并修复验证器漏洞，提升RLVR训练的鲁棒性。

title: PMC-InterCPT: Rethinking Biomedical Interleaved Data for Multimodal Continued Pretraining
summary: Large-scale biomedical image-text datasets extracted from scientific literature provide valuable resources for medical multimodal model training. These datasets are commonly organized as image-caption pairs; however, figure captions are often short, context-dependent, and only partially informative without the surrounding article text. At the same time, large-scale automatic extraction introduces structural noise such as missing captions, residual markup, duplicated context, and incoherent multi-paragraph figure descriptions. We revisit data construction for medical multimodal continued pretraining (CPT) and present PMC-InterCPT, a context-grounded biomedical interleaved corpus that incorporates figure-referencing body text in addition to captions. Our pipeline recovers missing captions, cleans caption and context text, reconstructs coherent interleaved image-text samples, and applies LLM-supervised medical relevance and quality classifiers to filter noisy records. We further reveal strong modality imbalance in the resulting corpus and introduce a four-bucket evidence taxonomy for modality-aware resampling. Through CPT followed by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, PMC-InterCPT effectively improves medical and general multimodal performance while using fewer CPT tokens than the raw source pool. The experimental results also illustrate the complementarity between the data quality and modality for medical multimodal CPT.

AI.tldr: 论文提出PMC-InterCPT，一种基于上下文-图像的生物医学交错语料库，通过恢复缺失标题、清洗文本、重建交错样本以及LLM监督的质量过滤，有效提升了医疗多模态模型的继续预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学图像-文本数据集存在标题简短、依赖上下文、提取噪声多等问题，导致图像-文本对信息不完整，影响多模态模型的预训练效果。
AI.method: 1) 构建上下文-图像交错的语料库PMC-InterCPT，将引用图像的正文文本与标题结合；2) 恢复缺失标题、清洗噪声文本、重建连贯的交错样本；3) 使用LLM监督的医学相关性和质量分类器过滤噪声；4) 提出四桶证据分类法进行模态感知重采样。
AI.result: 在Qwen3.5-4B-Base上通过CPT和SFT，PMC-InterCPT在使用更少CPT token的情况下，有效提升了医学和通用多模态性能。
AI.conclusion: 数据质量和模态平衡对于医学多模态继续预训练具有互补性，合理的语料构建和重采样策略能显著提升模型性能。

title: A Systematic Benchmark of Intraoperative Ultrasound-to-MR Synthesis for Brain Tumour Surgery
summary: Intraoperative ultrasound (ioUS) is a versatile, cost-effective modality in brain tumour surgery, but its interpretation is difficult: acquisition planes are non-standard, artefacts are modality-specific, and its appearance differs markedly from the preoperative MRI on which surgical-planning tools, segmentation models and the surgeon's experience rely. Synthesising MRI-like images from ioUS could let this MRI-based infrastructure be reused intraoperatively without an extra scan. Most prior work evaluates a single architecture in isolation; to our knowledge, no benchmark has spanned architectural paradigms, inference regimes and downstream-task endpoints under a common protocol. We address this gap on the public ReMIND data set (76 patients; 153 paired ioUS/T2w and 104 paired ioUS/FLAIR studies; 60/16 patient-level train/held-out split). Six generators (four GAN baselines: Pix2Pix, SwinPix2Pix, CycleGAN, CUT; the transformer-augmented ResViT; and the few-step diffusion model SynDiff) were each trained under four inference regimes (2D, 2.5D, 2D + 3D-refinement, full-3D) and two targets (T2w only; T2w + FLAIR multi-task), yielding 48 experiments. Image-fidelity metrics (SSIM, PSNR, MAE, LPIPS) were complemented by an nnU-Net v2 downstream segmentation evaluation (tumour and resection cavity) and by subgroup analyses by histological grade and reoperation. No architecture dominated every axis, and, critically, perceptual quality tracked downstream utility most closely (LPIPS, r=-0.66, p<0.001), whereas higher SSIM was associated with worse utility (r=-0.64, p<0.001); SynDiff-2.5D best preserved downstream segmentation (U_Dice=0.55). Perceptual and downstream-task metrics should therefore be reported alongside or in preference to global SSIM, and architecture choice conditioned on surgical phase, patient history and clinical objective.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统比较了六种MRI合成方法（四种GAN、ResViT、SynDiff）在四种推理模式（2D/2.5D/2D+3D-refinement/全3D）和两种目标（T2w/T2w+FLAIR）下的表现，共48个实验。关键发现：无单一架构全面最优；感知质量（LPIPS）与下游分割效用正相关，而SSIM越高反而效用越差；SynDiff-2.5D在下游分割中表现最佳（U_Dice=0.55）。建议优先报告感知和下游任务指标而非全局SSIM，架构选择应依据手术阶段、患者病史和临床目标。
AI.motivation: 术中超声（ioUS）在脑肿瘤手术中成本低但解读困难，现有MRI基础设施（手术规划工具、分割模型、外科医生经验）无法直接复用。现有研究大多孤立评估单一架构，缺乏跨架构范式、推理模式和下游任务端点的统一基准。
AI.method: 在ReMIND数据集（76名患者，153对ioUS/T2w和104对ioUS/FLAIR）上，训练6种生成器（Pix2Pix、SwinPix2Pix、CycleGAN、CUT、ResViT、SynDiff），每种在4种推理模式（2D、2.5D、2D+3D-refinement、全3D）和2种目标（仅T2w、T2w+FLAIR多任务）下共48个实验。使用图像保真度指标（SSIM、PSNR、MAE、LPIPS）和nnU-Net v2下游分割评估（肿瘤和切除腔），并按组织学分级和再手术进行亚组分析。
AI.result: 无架构在所有维度上占优；LPIPS与下游效用显著正相关（r=-0.66, p<0.001），而SSIM与下游效用负相关（r=-0.64, p<0.001）；SynDiff-2.5D在下游分割中表现最佳（U_Dice=0.55）。
AI.conclusion: 应优先报告感知和下游任务指标而非全局SSIM；架构选择应根据手术阶段、患者病史和临床目标而定，而非追求单一的图像保真度指标。

title: CAREAgent: Clinical Agent with Structured Reasoning and Tool-Integrated for Order Generation
summary: Clinical order generation serves as a critical bridge between clinical decision-making and real-world practice, translating medical decisions into concrete and executable orders. Existing agents mainly focus on coarse-grained decisions and overlook the fine-grained, executable information required for clinical orders. To address this gap, we propose CAREAgent, an agent for clinical order generation. To support its training, we introduce a two-stage agentic reasoning data construction method. First, we design an agent framework that constructs verifiable reasoning trajectories aligned with realistic clinical tool usage. Second, we filter reasoning trajectories by format compliance, order validity, and clinical plausibility. Building on the constructed data, the model is first trained via supervised fine-tuning to acquire fundamental reasoning formats and medical knowledge, and is subsequently optimized through reinforcement learning with multi-dimensional reward functions to enhance complex clinical reasoning capabilities. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CAREAgent. On ClinicalBench (unseen during training), CAREAgent improves the F1 score by 5.05%, 2.09%, and 0.86% over the single-agent, multi-agent, and agentic reasoning methods, respectively.

AI.tldr: CAREAgent是一个用于临床医嘱生成的智能体，通过两阶段推理数据构建方法和强化学习优化，在多个基准测试上提升了F1分数（最高提升5.05%）。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体主要关注粗粒度的临床决策，忽略了临床医嘱所需的细粒度、可执行信息，导致无法生成具体的可执行医嘱。
AI.method: 提出两阶段智能体推理数据构建方法：(1) 设计智能体框架构建符合真实临床工具使用的可验证推理轨迹；(2) 通过格式合规性、医嘱有效性和临床合理性过滤推理轨迹。模型先通过监督微调学习基础推理格式和医学知识，再通过多维度奖励函数的强化学习优化复杂临床推理能力。
AI.result: 在未见过的ClinicalBench上，CAREAgent相比单智能体、多智能体和智能体推理方法，F1分数分别提升5.05%、2.09%和0.86%。
AI.conclusion: CAREAgent能有效弥补现有智能体在细粒度临床医嘱生成方面的不足，通过结构化推理数据构建和两阶段训练策略显著提升临床指令生成性能。

title: MENTIS: What Belief Changes Under Alignment? Measuring Multi-Scale Latent Torsion in Language Models
summary:
Preference alignment has substantially improved the observable behavior of large language models, yet it remains unclear what alignment changes internally. Aligned systems still fail under jailbreaks, prompt injection, and retrieval-time corruption, suggesting behavior-level evaluation alone is incomplete. Post-training should leave measurable traces in internal computation. We ask: when an instruction-tuned (IT) model becomes a preference-aligned (PA) model, what geometric structure changes, where do those changes concentrate, and how selectively do they vary across concepts, prompts, and model families?
  We introduce MENTIS, a geometry-first framework for measuring alignment-induced internal reorganization in paired checkpoints. MENTIS compares IT and PA models using a primary layerwise covariance-based torsion norm (T1), a secondary spectral torsion diagnostic (T2), and an Energy-Radiance-Activation measure (ERA) for depth localization. Across four 7-8B model pairs on LITMUS, our study reveals that alignment-induced change is selective rather than uniform: normative concepts exhibit larger torsion shifts than factual concepts on average; torsion is negatively correlated with contextual entropy; and peak effects localize to architecture-specific mid-to-late layers. The same pattern appears across word-level, prompt-level, and model-level analyses. These results suggest preference alignment leaves structured, depth-localized geometric signatures in internal computation beyond what behavior-level evaluation alone can reveal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MENTIS框架，通过几何结构分析发现偏好对齐在LLM内部计算中留下选择性、深度定位的几何特征，且规范性概念比事实性概念变化更大。
AI.motivation: 现有行为级评估无法完全揭示偏好对齐对模型内部计算的影响，对齐后的模型仍存在安全漏洞，需要从内部几何结构层面理解对齐带来的变化。
AI.method: 提出MENTIS框架，包含三种度量：基于协方差的扭转范数（T1）、谱扭转诊断（T2）、能量-辐射-激活度量（ERA），在4组7-8B模型对上进行分析。
AI.result: 对齐引起的变化是选择性的：规范性概念扭转变化大于事实性概念；扭转与上下文熵负相关；峰值效应集中在架构特定的中后层。
AI.conclusion: 偏好对齐在模型内部计算中留下结构化、深度定位的几何签名，超越了行为级评估所能揭示的信息。

title: An Attribute-Based Measure of Video Complexity
summary: A new framework for the estimation of the complexity posed by video-question pairs to video-LLMs, Video Attribute-Based Complexity (VideoABC), is proposed. Video complexity is defined as the probability of failure of a video-LLM for a given video-question pair. VideoABC is a non-parametric complexity measure, using a reference video dataset and a pre-defined vocabulary of video attributes informative of complexity, \eg the scene complexity or the speed of the video event informative of the question. In a training phase, reference videos are projected into the space of these attributes, which is then quantized. The expected ABC of each quantization cell is then computed. Given a new video and its projection into the attribute space, complexity is estimated by the expected ABC of the associated quantization cell. To enable the use of VideoABC with small reference video datasets, two quantizers are combined: a k-means quantizer that enables accurate complexity estimates for samples in the distribution of the reference dataset and a universal lattice quantizer that guarantees generalization to out-of-distribution samples. A synthetic video generation procedure, inspired by target-distractor manipulations of psychophysics studies, is proposed to populate the cells of the lattice quantizer during training, enabling the computation of their expected ABCs. Experimental results show that VideoABCis effective even with very low-dimensional attribute representations, substantially outperforming approaches like `video-LLM as judge' with much less complexity. Finally, the explainable nature of the VideoABC score, in terms of well-defined attributes, is shown to provide insights on how the attribute composition of benchmarks affects their complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的视频-文本对复杂度评估框架VideoABC，通过量化视频属性空间来预测视频大模型失败概率，结合k-means和通用格量化器实现高精度与泛化性，并利用合成视频生成方法提升小样本场景下的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大模型评估缺乏对视频-问题对复杂度的系统度量，已有的"视频大模型作为裁判"方法计算复杂且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 定义视频复杂度为模型失败概率；使用预定义属性词汇将视频投影到属性空间并量化；结合k-means量化器（分布内准确）与通用格量化器（分布外泛化）；通过目标-干扰物合成视频生成方法填充格量化器单元。
AI.result: 在低维属性表示下仍有效，显著优于"视频大模型作为裁判"方法，且具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: VideoABC框架提供了一种高效、可解释的视频-问题复杂度评估方法，并能揭示不同基准测试的属性组成如何影响其复杂度。

title: Diagnosing LLM Arbitration Behavior over Pre-evidence Epistemic States in RAG-based Fact-Checking
summary: In RAG-based fact-checking, LLMs are increasingly used as verifiers to check given claims against retrieved evidence. Their parametric knowledge can induce pre-evidence tendencies that may conflict with the retrieved context, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not characterize such prior-context discrepancy or measure how verifiers arbitrate between parametric and contextual signals. We introduce \textsc{PAVE} (\emph{Prior-Aware Verifier Evaluation}), a diagnostic testbed that stratifies an LLM verifier into four epistemic states based on the correctness and confidence of its pre-evidence prior and evaluates its arbitration behavior on this new benchmark, i.e., whether it persists in correct prior under misleading evidence, and whether it corrects wrong prior when accurate evidence is provided. Experiments across seven LLMs reveal unreliable and highly model-dependent prior-context arbitration, highlighting the importance of verifier selection for real-world RAG-based fact-checking applications. Based on these findings, we propose a lightweight JSD-based test-time arbitration method that improves factual reliability without modifying the underlying model, achieving competitive performance across diverse LLM families.

AI.tldr: 提出PAVE诊断测试平台，评估LLM验证者在RAG事实核查中如何仲裁先验知识与检索证据之间的冲突，并基于发现提出轻量级JSD仲裁方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估框架未考虑LLM在事实核查中的先验知识与检索证据之间的偏差，无法衡量验证者如何仲裁这两种信号。
AI.method: 构建PAVE测试平台，将LLM验证者分为四种认知状态，评估其在正确/错误先验与正确/误导性证据下的仲裁行为，并提出基于JSD的轻量级测试时仲裁方法。
AI.result: 在7个LLM上的实验显示，先验-证据仲裁不可靠且高度依赖模型，验证了选择合适验证者的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的JSD仲裁方法无需修改底层模型即可提升事实可靠性，在不同LLM家族上均表现良好。

title: When Is 0.1% Enough? Analyzing the Combined Effects of Dimensionality Reduction and Quantization on Text Embedding Compression
summary: Recent high-performing text embedding models often output high-dimensional real-valued vectors, resulting in substantial storage and computational costs. To address this issue, compression methods based on dimensionality reduction or quantization have been proposed; however, the effects of combining dimensionality reduction and quantization have not been sufficiently investigated. In this paper, we systematically examine the effectiveness of compressing text embeddings by combining dimensionality reduction and quantization, using four MTEB task families and four pretrained embedding models. The experimental results demonstrate that combining dimensionality reduction and quantization enables substantially stronger compression than using either method alone, that in some settings embeddings can be reduced to as little as 0.1% of their original size with almost no performance degradation, and that the optimal compression strategy depends on the task.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了文本嵌入向量的压缩方法，发现将降维与量化相结合可以显著提高压缩效率，在部分场景下可将嵌入向量压缩至原来的0.1%而性能几乎不降，且最优压缩策略因任务而异。
AI.motivation: 现有的高维实数文本嵌入向量存储和计算成本高，尽管已有降维或量化的压缩方法，但二者结合的效果尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 使用四种MTEB任务族和四种预训练嵌入模型，系统评估了降维与量化结合的压缩效果。
AI.result: 降维与量化结合相比单独使用任一方法压缩效果更强；部分设置下嵌入可压缩至原大小的0.1%且性能几乎无损；最优压缩策略取决于具体任务。
AI.conclusion: 降维与量化结合是更优的文本嵌入压缩策略，但需要根据任务特性选择具体方案。

title: Collaborative Few-Step Distillation and Low-Bit Quantization for Wan2.2 Dual-Expert Video Diffusion Models
summary: Large video diffusion models achieve strong visual quality but remain expensive to deploy because each sample requires many denoising steps and a large resident parameter footprint. This paper studies a deployment-oriented compression pipeline for Wan2.2-T2V-A14B by combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization. The pipeline follows the model's dual-expert denoising route, calibrates the high-noise and low-noise branches separately, protects sensitive entrance layers, and uses HiF4-style low-bit representation to improve dynamic-range coverage. Quantization is calibrated on the distilled few-step student rather than on the original long-step trajectory, reducing activation-distribution mismatch during inference. The proposed co-design keeps the quantized model close to the same-step full-precision model and surpasses the original full-precision baseline at 8 and 20 steps on average. The 20-step setting gives the best quality-efficiency trade-off in the tested configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对Wan2.2-T2V-A14B视频扩散模型的部署优化压缩管道，结合少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化，在保持高质量的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 大型视频扩散模型虽然视觉质量高，但部署成本高昂，因为每个样本需要大量去噪步骤和巨大的模型参数。为降低部署成本，需要一种有效的压缩方法。
AI.method: 采用少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化相结合的方式；遵循模型的双专家去噪路径，分别校准高噪声和低噪声分支；保护敏感入口层；使用HiF4风格的低比特表示提升动态范围覆盖；在蒸馏后的少步学生模型上而非原始长步轨迹上进行量化校准，减少推理时的激活分布不匹配。
AI.result: 量化模型在少步设置下接近同步数全精度模型，在8步和20步设置下平均超越原始全精度基线。20步配置在测试中实现了最佳质量-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 少步蒸馏与低比特量化协同设计能有效压缩视频扩散模型，在降低部署成本的同时保持甚至提升生成质量，20步设置提供了最佳质量与效率的平衡。

title: SkillRevise: Improving LLM-Authored Agent Skills via Trace-Conditioned Skill Revision
summary: Agent skills are procedural artifacts that enable LLM agents to execute workflows, verify constraints, and recover from failures. Existing self-evolving methods refine skills using accumulated trajectories. However, they struggle in cold-start settings, where only an initial, imperfect skill is available. Consequently, skill construction defaults to expert authoring or one-shot LLM generation. Expert-authored skills are costly and may not align with how LLM agents actually execute tasks, while one-shot generated skills can be syntactically well formed yet behaviorally weak. To bridge this gap, we propose SkillRevise, an execution-grounded framework designed to iteratively refine these initial skills. SkillRevise diagnoses skill defects from execution evidence, retrieves relevant repair principles from a general memory, and applies execution-anchored edits. By re-executing candidates and measuring empirical utility, it systematically retains the optimal skill version. Evaluated across three benchmarks and five LLMs, SkillRevise substantially outperforms one-shot baselines, improving the base agent's success rate on SkillsBench from 36.05% to 61.63%. Furthermore, the revised skills exhibit strong cross-model transferability, capturing generalized procedural knowledge over model-specific artifacts.

AI.tldr: 提出SkillRevise框架，通过执行驱动的方式迭代优化LLM智能体的初始技能，在冷启动场景下显著提升性能（成功率从36.05%提升至61.63%），且修订后的技能具有良好的跨模型迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化方法在冷启动场景下效果不佳，初始技能通常依赖专家编写（成本高且可能不匹配实际执行）或一次性LLM生成（语法正确但行为弱），缺乏有效的迭代优化机制。
AI.method: SkillRevise框架包含三个核心步骤：1) 从执行证据中诊断技能缺陷；2) 从通用记忆中检索相关修复原则；3) 执行锚定的编辑操作。通过重新执行候选技能并测量经验效用，系统性地保留最优版本。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试和五个LLM上的评估中，SkillRevise显著优于一次性基线方法，将SkillsBench上基础智能体的成功率从36.05%提升至61.63%。修订后的技能展现出强大的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: SkillRevise通过执行驱动的迭代优化有效解决了冷启动场景下智能体技能优化问题，生成的技能不仅性能优异，还能捕获跨模型的通用过程知识，具有实际应用价值。

title: On the Generalization Gap in Self-Evolving Language Model Reasoning
summary: Recent work suggests that large language models (LLMs) can improve through self-evolution (SE), using supervision signals generated by the model itself. In this work, we ask: under a strict closed-loop setup, where the self-evolution algorithm has access only to an unlabeled prompt set and a base model, how close can internally generated supervision come to oracle-supervised training? We analyze four representative strategies in a unified offline self-evolution framework: single-round verification, multi-turn revision with feedback, iterative training, and curriculum learning. Our primary experiments use Knights and Knaves (KK) logical reasoning tasks, which provide deterministic solutions, controlled difficulty levels, and a clean testbed for easy-to-hard generalization. We first show that self-evolution consistently improves over the base model, but plateaus after excessive training compute is invested, and eventually still leaves a non-trivial gap to oracle supervision. We find that multi-turn critic-revision with large models can reach strong self-evolution performance, with Gemma 12B nearly matching oracle-supervised training. Beyond Knights and Knaves, we also evaluate self-evolution on real-world reasoning benchmarks, where gains are also modest. Overall, our results characterize when closed-loop self-evolution can help and show how internally generated supervision remains insufficient under this minimal formulation.

AI.tldr: 本文在严格的闭环设定下研究大语言模型的自我进化能力，发现自我进化虽然能提升模型性能，但最终仍与有监督训练存在差距，其中大模型的多轮批评-修正策略表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 探究在仅有无标签提示集和基础模型的闭环设定下，自我进化算法产生的内部监督信号能与有监督训练达到多近的效果。
AI.method: 在统一的离线自我进化框架下分析了四种策略：单轮验证、多轮批评-修正、迭代训练和课程学习，主要使用Knights and Knaves逻辑推理任务作为测试床。
AI.result: 自我进化持续提升基础模型性能但最终趋于平稳，与有监督训练仍有显著差距；多轮批评-修正策略表现最强，Gemma 12B几乎匹配有监督训练效果。
AI.conclusion: 闭环自我进化在有限条件下能够帮助模型提升，但内部生成的监督信号仍不足以替代有监督训练。

title: TAP-JEPA: Frozen Future-Latent Probing and Two-Stage Score Fusion for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation
comment: The runner-up solution for the Action Anticipation Challenge, EPIC-KITCHENS-100 at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026
summary: This report presents TAP-JEPA, our runner-up submission to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 (EK-100) Action Anticipation Challenge at EgoVis 2026. The task is to anticipate the next verb, noun, and verb-noun action from an egocentric clip that ends before the target action begins. Instead of fine-tuning a large video backbone, TAP-JEPA builds a compact anticipation model on frozen V-JEPA 2.1 features: a ViT-G/384 encoder extracts visible pre-action tokens, the pre-trained latent predictor estimates near-future tokens from the observed context, and both token groups are fused by attentive probes with task-specific queries for verbs, nouns, and action pairs. For the final submission, we expand supervised training with the official training split and most of the validation split, reserving a small subset for sanity checks and qualitative inspection, and adopt a two-stage score fusion that first averages eight independently initialized probe replicas within each epoch and then merges candidates from epochs 12-20 with field-dependent weights. On the official open-testing leaderboard, our sunshinesky entry achieves 27.91 percent overall action Mean Top-5 Recall (MT5R), ranking second and only 0.04 percentage points behind the top score.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAP-JEPA方法，在EPIC-KITCHENS-100动作预测挑战赛中获得亚军（MT5R 27.91%），通过冻结V-JEPA 2.1特征、构建紧凑预测模型、采用注意力探针与两阶段分数融合实现高效动作预测。
AI.motivation: 在不微调大型视频骨干网络的前提下，利用冻结的预训练特征高效完成第一人称视频动作预测任务。
AI.method: 基于冻结的V-JEPA 2.1（ViT-G/384）提取可见预动作token，使用预训练潜在预测器估计近未来token，结合注意力探针与任务特定查询融合两组token；采用两阶段分数融合（先平均8个探针副本，再融合12-20轮候选结果）。
AI.result: 在官方测试榜单上以27.91%的Mean Top-5 Recall获得第二名，仅落后第一名0.04个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过冻结特征+紧凑预测模型即可达到与微调大模型相媲美的性能，验证了预训练视觉特征在动作预测任务中的高效性。

title: Reasoning4Sciences: Bridging Reasoning Language Models to All Scientific Branches
summary: While Reasoning Language Models (RLMs) are rapidly emerging as powerful tools for scientific research, their impact is primarily concentrated in "hard science" fields. The slow -- or lack of -- adoption of RLMs in other branches of science is causing a widening gap in research productivity. In this survey, we provide the first comprehensive analysis of RLM adoption across 28 scientific disciplines following the classification used by the European Research Council (ERC), spanning the Social Sciences and Humanities, Physical Sciences and Engineering, and Life Sciences. We examine how RLMs are developed, evaluated, and applied across disciplines. Furthermore, we introduce a maturity-oriented assessment framework based on available domain-specific development and evaluation resources, revealing substantial disparities in RLM maturity that become even more pronounced when only publicly available resources are considered. Finally, we highlight current implementation paradigms that are gaining popularity across disciplines, current challenges, and future directions in enabling RLM adoption across science.

AI.tldr: 本文首次全面调查了推理语言模型（RLMs）在28个科学学科中的采用情况，发现不同学科间存在显著的成熟度差异，特别是在软科学与硬科学之间，并提出了基于领域资源的成熟度评估框架。
AI.motivation: RLMs在硬科学领域快速发展，但在社会科学、人文科学等领域的应用严重滞后，导致研究生产力差距日益扩大。本文旨在系统分析这一差距，为促进RLMs在更广泛科学领域的采用提供指导。
AI.method: 按照欧洲研究理事会（ERC）对28个科学学科的分类标准，全面综述RLMs在各学科中的开发、评估和应用情况，并提出一个基于可用领域资源的成熟度评估框架。
AI.result: 不同学科间RLMs成熟度存在显著差异，当仅考虑公开可用资源时，这种差异更加明显。同时识别出跨学科流行的实施范式以及当前面临的挑战。
AI.conclusion: RLMs在各科学领域的采用不均衡，需要弥合软科学与硬科学之间的差距。本文指出了未来方向，以推动RLMs在全科学领域的广泛采用。

title: Deep Research as Rubric for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Open-ended reasoning and long-form generation tasks lack reliable automatic verification signals for reward-based policy optimization. Rubrics offer a promising alternative, but existing approaches treat them as given artifacts -- either hand-crafted or prompt-generated -- and often miss the task-specific, knowledge-intensive dimensions that matter most, distorting the reward signal. Our key observation is that rubric construction is itself a research problem: identifying what makes a response correct or insightful requires discovering and synthesizing external knowledge. We propose Deep Research as Rubric (DR-rubric), a two-stage framework for constructing such rubrics. Stage I elicits domain facts, structural constraints, and failure modes through iterative multi-turn agentic search; Stage II distills this evidence into atomic, independently verifiable constraints for GRPO-based policy optimization. Because the model under training can serve as its own rubric generator, DR-rubric-8B supports bootstrap rubric generation without frontier-model assistance. We evaluate on 6 benchmarks spanning agentic research and expert reasoning. Experiments show that DR-Rubric achieves strong competitive performance with only 1K -- 3K training instances, where GPT-5-generated rubrics particularly benefit breadth coverage on agentic tasks, Gemini-generated rubrics yield the most balanced performance across agentic and expert reasoning tasks, and bootstrap rubrics exhibit a specialization-to-rebalancing evolution achieving the best overall performance at the third iteration. Results demonstrate that reframing rubric construction from static evaluation templates into an evidence-driven research process yields more scalable, fine-grained reward signals for open-ended tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DR-rubric框架，将评估标准构建从静态模板转变为证据驱动的研究过程，通过两阶段（多轮智能体搜索+原子化约束蒸馏）生成细粒度奖励信号，用于开放任务策略优化，实验表明仅需少量训练实例即可达到强竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 开放推理和长文本生成任务缺乏可靠的自动验证信号用于奖励策略优化。现有基于评估标准的方法将其视为给定成品（人工或提示生成），忽略了任务特定的知识密集型维度，导致奖励信号失真。因此，需要一种能自动发现并综合外部知识的评估标准构建方法。
AI.method: 提出Deep Research as Rubric (DR-rubric)两阶段框架：第一阶段通过迭代多轮智能体搜索获取领域事实、结构约束和失败模式；第二阶段将这些证据蒸馏为原子化、可独立验证的约束，用于GRPO策略优化。模型自身可作为评估标准生成器，无需前沿模型辅助。
AI.result: 在6个基准测试上，仅用1K-3K训练实例即达到强竞争性能。GPT-5生成的评估标准在代理任务上广度覆盖最优，Gemini生成的评估标准在代理和专家推理任务上表现最均衡，自举评估标准在第三次迭代时达到最佳综合性能。
AI.conclusion: 将评估标准构建从静态评估模板重新定义为证据驱动的研究过程，能够为开放任务生成更可扩展、更细粒度的奖励信号。

title: T-CLIP: Enabling Thermal Perception for Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining
summary: Thermal imaging offers a powerful alternative to visible-spectrum vision under challenging conditions such as low illumination and adverse weather, yet foundational vision-language models like CLIP fail to align thermal images with textual descriptions due to a fundamental thermal perception gap. We identify three major challenges: the lack of captioned thermal datasets, the inability of standard LLMs to reason about thermal phenomena, and a key representational challenge in thermal imaging where global scene context and object-level heat signatures conflict when learned together in a single embedding space. To address these, we introduce IR-Cap, the first physics-aware thermal captioning pipeline and dataset providing complementary global and fine-grained thermal descriptions across three public benchmarks, and T-CLIP, a decoupled dual-LoRA framework that independently adapts CLIP for scene-level and object-level thermal understanding. T-CLIP achieves consistent improvements over all baselines across three thermal benchmarks in cross-modal retrieval, and we provide an exploratory demonstration of its applicability to text-conditioned thermal image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IR-Cap热成像描述数据集和T-CLIP双LoRA框架，弥合热成像与视觉语言模型间的感知鸿沟，在跨模态检索等任务上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（如CLIP）无法对齐热成像图像与文本描述，主要由于缺乏热成像标注数据集、LLM无法推理热现象，以及全局场景与局部热信号在单一嵌入空间中的表征冲突。
AI.method: 构建IR-Cap物理感知热成像描述管道及数据集，提供全局与细粒度描述；提出T-CLIP解耦双LoRA框架，分别独立适应CLIP的场景级与物体级热成像理解。
AI.result: T-CLIP在三个热成像基准上的跨模态检索任务中一致优于所有基线方法，并初步展示了其在文本条件热成像生成中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦全局与局部热特征表示，T-CLIP有效弥合了热成像与视觉语言模型之间的感知鸿沟，为热成像领域的多模态理解提供了新范式。

title: Expected Value Alignment for Generative Reward Modeling in Formal Mathematics Verification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used with formal interactive theorem provers such as Lean 4. Scaling these systems with reinforcement learning or search methods requires process reward models (PRMs) that can evaluate intermediate reasoning steps. Existing reward-model designs expose a practical trade-off. Value-head models provide continuous scores but modify the generative model interface, while generative reward models preserve textual rationales but are poorly matched to continuous floating-point regression because numeric values are split across tokens. We introduce Expected Value Alignment (EVA), a reward-modeling procedure that keeps the surface output discrete while extracting continuous scores from the model's token distribution. The model emits integer scores in a structured JSON format, and EVA computes a continuous score as the expectation over the logits of the corresponding anchor tokens. Training combines the causal language modeling objective with an auxiliary mean squared error loss on these expected values. We instantiate EVA in \textit{Leibniz}, a reward model for Lean 4 formal verification, and evaluate it against zero-shot and reward-modeling baselines. The evaluation demonstrates that continuous logit-based scoring significantly reduces discretization artifacts while retaining the interpretability of generative critiques.

AI.tldr: 提出EVA方法，通过从token分布中提取期望值实现离散输出与连续评分兼得，并在Lean 4形式验证推理任务中验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有PRM在离散输出与连续评分之间存在权衡：值头模型修改生成接口，生成式奖励模型难以处理连续浮点回归。
AI.method: EVA让模型以结构化JSON格式输出整数分数，通过锚标记的logits期望计算连续分数，训练结合语言建模目标与MSE损失。
AI.result: 在Lean 4形式验证任务中，EVA相比零样本和基线奖励模型，显著减少了离散化伪影，同时保持了生成式评判的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于logits的连续评分有效弥合了离散输出与连续评估之间的鸿沟，为形式推理中的奖励建模提供了新范式。

title: MiCU: End-to-End Smart Home Command Understanding with Large Language Model
summary: Command understanding systems in smart home ecosystems can automate device control and substantially improve user experience. However, while they perform well on precise utterances (e.g., "turn on the bedroom light"), they struggle with ambiguous or misaligned commands (e.g., "make the bedroom cozy"). Large language models (LLMs) generalize well across various domains and can outperform traditional rule-based systems on such tasks, but their effectiveness is often constrained by scarce domain-specific data, insufficient task-specific adaptation, and high computational costs. In this paper, we propose an automated training data synthesis workflow using user logs and LLMs; then we build MiCU, a domain-specific LLM that excels at command understanding. Specifically, we employ curriculum learning to inject domain knowledge into the base LLM, then we enhance its reasoning ability via cold-start training combined with reinforcement learning (RL) guided by domain-specific thinking rules. Additionally, we introduce a token compression technique that condenses device description into a single special token, substantially reducing inference overhead and enabling \model-fast, an efficient variant optimized for long inputs. Extensive experiments show that MiCU significantly outperforms baselines, with an average accuracy gain of 20.01% across all device categories. We have deployed MiCU in the Xiaomi Home app, receiving approximately 1.7 million page views per day. Production evaluations show that MiCU reduces user correction rate by 1.57% and increases human audited accuracy by 32.05%. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/xiaomi-research/iot_spec_llm

AI.tldr: 本文提出MiCU，一个面向智能家居命令理解领域的专用大语言模型。通过自动化数据合成、课程学习、强化学习和token压缩技术，MiCU在命令理解任务上平均准确率提升20.01%，已在小米Home app部署，日页面浏览量约170万次。
AI.motivation: 智能家居系统中的命令理解在模糊或歧义指令上表现不佳，现有LLM虽泛化能力强，但受限于领域数据稀缺、任务适配不足和计算成本高。
AI.method: 1）利用用户日志和LLM自动合成训练数据；2）采用课程学习注入领域知识；3）结合冷启动训练和强化学习（RL）增强推理能力，RL由领域特定思维规则引导；4）引入token压缩技术，将设备描述压缩为单个特殊token，降低推理开销。
AI.result: 在所有设备类别上平均准确率提升20.01%，在小米Home app部署后日页面浏览量约170万，用户纠正率降低1.57%，人工审核准确率提升32.05%。
AI.conclusion: MiCU通过领域专用优化显著提升了智能家居命令理解的准确率和效率，验证了自动化数据合成与强化学习相结合的有效性。

title: A Modelling and Evaluation Framework for EuroCrops-Driven Sentinel-2 Crop Segmentation
summary:
This work presents a configurable pipeline for generating semantic-segmentation-ready agricultural datasets from Sentinel-2 imagery and EuroCrops parcel-level annotations. The workflow transforms heterogeneous vector crop annotations into aligned multispectral image--mask pairs through label harmonization, Sentinel-2 product selection, spatial alignment, rasterization, patch extraction, quality filtering, and class-aware sample selection. The generated dataset contains 67,337 patches from five European countries and uses a reduced taxonomy of ten crop classes plus background.
  A four-level U-Net with Group Normalization was trained using 10 Sentinel-2 spectral bands and a composite loss combining class-weighted cross-entropy and Dice loss. On the internal EuroCrops-based test split, the model achieved a mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) of 0.7665, a pixel accuracy of 0.8693, and a mean class accuracy of 0.9072. Compared with spectral and spatial-context Random Forest baselines, the U-Net showed the importance of learned multi-scale spatial representations for crop segmentation.
  External evaluation was performed on unseen Belgian EuroCrops subsets, DACIA5, and PASTIS. The results show a clear performance gap under external and cross-dataset evaluation, especially for benchmarks with different taxonomies, annotation protocols, spatial coverage, or temporal organization. The model transfers more reliably to dominant and taxonomically aligned classes such as maize and wheat, while performance remains limited for several minority classes and for the adapted single-date PASTIS setting. These findings highlight both the potential and the limitations of using EuroCrops-derived supervision for Sentinel-2 crop segmentation under realistic domain shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从Sentinel-2影像和EuroCrops地块标注生成农业语义分割数据集的配置化流程，并训练U-Net模型进行评估，在内部测试集上达到76.65% mIoU，但在外部跨数据集评估中表现存在差距。
AI.motivation: 现有农业遥感语义分割数据集缺乏标准化且标注成本高，亟需一种可配置、可扩展的自动化流程，从已有的大规模地块级标注（EuroCrops）和公开卫星影像（Sentinel-2）高效生成高质量训练数据。
AI.method: 构建配置化pipeline，包括标签统一、Sentinel-2产品选择、空间对齐、栅格化、图块提取、质量过滤和类别感知样本选择；使用10个光谱波段训练四层U-Net（Group Normalization），损失函数为加权交叉熵+Dice损失联合损失。
AI.result: 内部测试集mIoU 0.7665，像素精度0.8693，平均类别精度0.9072；U-Net优于随机森林基线；外部评估在比利时子集、DACIA5和PASTIS上性能明显下降，玉米和小麦等主导类别迁移较好，少数类别和单日期PASTIS设置下表现有限。
AI.conclusion: EuroCrops监督信号在Sentinel-2作物分割中具有潜力，但在真实域偏移场景下（跨数据集、不同分类体系、标注协议、时空覆盖）仍存在明显局限，少数类别和单时相设置下的迁移能力有待提升。

title: Deft Scheduling of Dynamic Cloud Workflows with Varying Deadlines via Mixture-of-Experts
comment: This paper has been accepted by the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: Workflow scheduling in cloud computing demands the intelligent allocation of dynamically arriving, graph-structured workflows with varying deadlines onto ever-changing virtual machine resources. However, existing deep reinforcement learning (DRL) schedulers remain limited by rigid, single-path inference architectures that struggle to handle diverse scheduling scenarios. We introduce \textbf{DEFT} (\textbf{D}eadline-p\textbf{E}rceptive Mixture-o\textbf{F}-Exper\textbf{t}s), an innovative DRL policy architecture that leverages a specialized mixture of experts, each trained to manage different levels of deadline tightness. To our knowledge, DEFT is the first to introduce and validate a Mixture-of-Experts architecture for dynamic cloud workflow scheduling. By adaptively routing decisions through the most appropriate experts, DEFT is capable of meeting a broad spectrum of deadline requirements that no single expert can achieve. Central to DEFT is a \textbf{graph-adaptive} gating mechanism that encodes workflow deadlines and DAGs, task states, and VM conditions, using cross-attention to guide expert activation in a fine-grained, deadline-sensitive manner. Experiments on dynamic cloud workflow benchmarks demonstrate that DEFT significantly reduces execution cost and deadline violations, outperforming multiple state-of-the-art DRL baselines.

AI.tldr: DEFT提出了一种基于混合专家（MoE）架构的深度强化学习调度策略，用于云计算中的动态工作流调度。它通过图自适应门控机制，根据截止时间紧急性路由到不同专家，显著降低了执行成本和截止时间违规率。
AI.motivation: 现有DRL调度器采用僵化的单路径推理架构，难以应对多样化的调度场景（如不同截止时间紧急性），缺乏针对动态云工作流调度的灵活适应能力。
AI.method: 提出DEFT策略架构，包含：(1) 多个专家网络，每个专家针对不同截止时间紧急性训练；(2) 图自适应门控机制，利用交叉注意力编码工作流DAG、任务状态、VM条件及截止时间，实现细粒度的专家激活路由。
AI.result: 在动态云工作流基准测试上，DEFT显著降低了执行成本和截止时间违规率，优于多个最先进的DRL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DEFT是首个将混合专家（MoE）架构引入动态云工作流调度并验证其有效性的工作，证明了自适应专家路由能够满足单一模型无法覆盖的广泛截止时间需求。

title: From Outliers to Errors: Auditing Pali-to-English LLM Translations with Multi-Reference Adjudication
comment: Preprint. This manuscript has not yet been peer reviewed
summary: Single-score translation metrics can conflate legitimate variation with error, a problem especially acute for classical languages where multiple defensible English renderings of the same passage coexist. We audit Pali-to-English output from four flagship large language models (LLMs): GPT-5.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Grok 4.3, on 1,700 passages from the Pali Canon, using three established human translations by Bhikkhu Sujato, Thanissaro Bhikkhu, and Bhikkhu Bodhi as a local reference envelope rather than a single gold standard. Each candidate's normalized embedding drift from the reference centroid serves as a triage signal, not an error label; the 1,203 candidates above a 1.5 drift threshold are then adjudicated by a blinded three-model LLM judge panel, calibrated against a 300-instance author-adjudicated validation set. Two results stand out. First, drift predicts severity rather than error per se: the major-error rate among adjudicated high-drift candidates rose monotonically from 7.9% in the 1.5-2.0 band to 51.6% above 3.0, while approximately 80% of 1.5-2.0 outliers were judged valid translation variations. Second, model differences were clearest in the high-drift tail: GPT-5.5 had the lowest adjudicated high-drift major-error rate, with confidence intervals overlapping those of Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro; Grok 4.3 had both the largest outlier volume and the highest tail major-error rate (27.6% overall, 74.4% above drift 3.0). The dominant major-error categories (e.g. omission or truncation, doctrinal term errors) are precisely the failures most likely to mislead readers of doctrinal text. The contribution is a reusable audit design for classical-to-modern translation: define a local reference envelope from multiple human translators, use embedding drift to prioritize review, and adjudicate the flagged tail rather than treating outlier status as error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对古典语言（巴利语）翻译质量审计的新方法：以多位人工译者的翻译作为“参考包络”，利用嵌入漂移作为分流信号，仅对高漂移候选译文进行盲审判定。实验发现漂移程度与错误严重性正相关，约80%的低度漂移实为合理变异，而GPT-5.5在高漂移段的大错率最低，Grok 4.3的异常量和尾端错误率最高。主要错误类型为遗漏/截断和教义术语错误。
AI.motivation: 传统单一评分翻译指标会将合理翻译变异与错误混为一谈，这一问题在古典语言翻译中尤为突出（同一段落存在多种合理的英文译法）。作者希望设计一种能区分合理变异与真正错误的审计方法。
AI.method: 以三位资深译者（Sujato、Thanissaro、Bodhi）的译文为“参考包络”，计算LLM候选译文的嵌入漂移；对1700段巴利经典进行测试，将漂移≥1.5的1203个候选交由三个LLM组成的盲审小组判定，并用300条人工标注验证集校准。
AI.result: 漂移预测的是严重程度而非单纯错误：1.5-2.0区间大错率仅7.9%，约80%为有效变异；漂移>3.0时大错率升至51.6%。模型差异在高漂移尾端最明显，GPT-5.5大错率最低，Grok 4.3尾端大错率达74.4%。主要错误类型为遗漏/截断和教义术语错误。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种可复用的古典到现代翻译审计方案：以多人译文为参考包络，用嵌入漂移优先排序审查，对标记的尾端进行判定而非将异常直接视为错误。

title: Shape-Prior-Based Point Cloud Completion for Single-Stage Fully Sparse 3D Object Detection
summary: Single-stage fully sparse 3D object detectors rely on point clouds data to detect objects in autonomous driving scenarios. However, the sparsity and incompleteness of point clouds significantly limit the performance of 3D object detection. To address this issue, this paper proposes a point clouds completion method specifically designed for single-stage fully sparse detectors. The entire shape-prior-based completion process consists of two consecutive steps. In the first step, we design a novel Instance Selection module, which is capable of identifying point clouds corresponding to foreground objects even when the baseline model does not generate proposals, while effectively ignoring the point clouds of background regions. In the second step, we introduce a novel Alignment-Based Point Completion module, which aligns the point clouds of foreground objects with prototypes in terms of both their centers and orientations. Subsequently, points are selected from the prototype to fill in the missing parts of the foreground object. We evaluated our method on two single-stage fully sparse detectors using the KITTI dataset. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves the detection performance, confirming its effectiveness and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种专为单阶段全稀疏3D检测器设计的点云补全方法，通过实例选择和基于对齐的点补全两步流程，有效提升了自动驾驶场景中3D目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 点云的稀疏性和不完整性严重限制了单阶段全稀疏3D目标检测器的性能，现有方法难以有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出两步补全流程：1) 实例选择模块，在基线模型未生成提议时也能识别前景物体点云；2) 基于对齐的点补全模块，将前景点云与原型在中心和朝向上对齐，然后从原型中选择点来填充缺失部分。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，使用两个单阶段全稀疏检测器进行评估，该方法显著提升了检测性能，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的点云补全方法能有效解决点云稀疏和不完整问题，提升单阶段全稀疏3D检测器的检测性能，且具有良好的泛化性。

title: "Skill issues'': data-centric optimization of lakehouse agents
summary: Coding agents are becoming users of data infrastructure, but their success depends not only on model quality: it also depends on the skills and environment files that teach agents how to use a system. We study how to optimize these artifacts for agents operating on a branching lakehouse, Bauplan. In our setting, headless APIs and Git-like data primitives expose data workflows through code, branches, commits, and merges. Our central observation is that a branching lakehouse turns data-agent evaluation from an output-matching problem into a state-verification problem: agent-generated pipeline code induces concrete, inspectable lakehouse changes. We present a data-centric optimization pipeline that generates task-verifier pairs, executes candidate skills in isolated sandboxes, and scores trajectories using both trace-level signals and programmatic checks over lakehouse state. In a preliminary evaluation on 25 tasks, optimized skills improve accuracy by 31.9%. These results suggest that write-path data workflows provide a useful substrate for optimizing agent skills beyond read-only tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了在分支数据湖仓（Bauplan）中，如何通过数据驱动的优化管道来优化智能体的技能和环境文件，从而提升编码智能体的表现。实验表明，优化后的技能将准确率提升了31.9%。
AI.motivation: 编码智能体的成功不仅依赖于模型质量，还取决于教会智能体如何使用系统的技能和环境文件。现有研究对这类工件的优化关注不足，尤其是对支持写路径（write-path）的数据工作流场景缺乏系统性方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种数据中心的优化管道，包括：生成任务-验证器对；在隔离沙箱中执行候选技能；利用轨迹级信号和基于湖仓状态的程序化检查对轨迹进行评分。将数据智能体评估从输出匹配问题转化为状态验证问题。
AI.result: 在25个任务的初步评估中，优化后的技能将准确率提升了31.9%。
AI.conclusion: 写路径数据工作流为优化智能体技能提供了有用的基础，超越了只读任务的局限。

title: Not All Explanations Simulate Equally: Comparing Verbalized Feature Attributions and Self-Generated Rationales
summary: Natural-language explanations are often treated as a unified interface for understanding model behavior, but different explanation sources may support simulation in different ways. This paper compares two families of explanations for question answering models: verbalized feature attributions and self-generated rationales. We evaluate them under a shared counterfactual simulation setting, using an LLM judge as predictor and measuring whether it can better predict a model's answers to follow-up questions when given its explanation. Across multiple instruction-tuned models, we analyze how explanation source, verbalization strategy, and feature granularity affect the simulatability of explanations. Our results show that explanation format and granularity affect simulatability: attribution-based explanations and self-generated rationales differ in how much they improve counterfactual prediction, with effects that vary across models and formats.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种自然语言解释（特征归因解释与自生成理由）在问答模型可模拟性方面的差异，发现解释格式和粒度会影响对模型行为的反事实预测能力。
AI.motivation: 探究不同来源的自然语言解释（基于属性的归因 vs 自生成理由）在多大程度上能够帮助理解模型行为，特别是在反事实模拟设置下的可预测性差异。
AI.method: 使用LLM作为评判者，在反事实模拟框架下，通过比较给定不同解释（特征归因 vs 自生成理由）时预测模型回答的准确性，系统分析了解释来源、语言化策略和特征粒度对可模拟性的影响。
AI.result: 解释格式和粒度显著影响可模拟性：基于属性的解释与自生成理由在提升反事实预测能力上存在差异，且这种效果在不同模型和格式间有所变化。
AI.conclusion: 不同来源的解释在支持模型行为模拟方面并非同等有效，解释格式和粒度的选择是关键影响因素，需根据具体模型和任务谨慎选择解释方式。

title: Wavelet-Fusion Diffusion Model for Multimodal Brain MRI Synthesis with Modality and Metadata Conditioning
comment: 51 pages, 7 figures, including supplementary material. Submitted to Imaging Neuroscience
summary: Multimodal MRI provides complementary information for neuroimaging analysis, where different imaging modalities capture distinct anatomical, tissue, and pathological features that support the development and evaluation of downstream AI applications. Although large-scale structural MRI resources are increasingly available, their modality coverage is often uneven across public and pooled neuroimaging datasets. This uneven modality coverage is further complicated by heterogeneity across sites, scanners, and acquisition protocols, as well as demographic and clinical variables that are often sparse, inconsistently recorded, or unavailable across studies. Synthetic MRI generation can help address this imbalance by synthesizing target-modality volumes for dataset augmentation and controlled synthetic cohort creation. However, many existing MRI synthesis approaches are trained on narrow modality sets or relatively homogeneous cohorts, limiting their applicability to large pooled neuroimaging resources where modality availability, acquisition protocols, and metadata coverage vary substantially across datasets. Diffusion models have become an attractive approach for MRI synthesis because of their strong sample fidelity and diversity, but sampling directly in 3D voxel space is computationally expensive and slow at inference. Latent diffusion improves practicality by synthesizing MRI in a learned, 3D latent space, although generation quality depends on the autoencoder's reconstruction fidelity and the resulting latent distribution. Our approach combines a Wavelet-Fusion variational autoencoder (WF-VAE) latent compressor with a conditional 3D U-Net diffusion model trained in the learned latent space using explicit modality and metadata conditioning. Our proposed Wavelet-Fusion Diffusion Model (WFDM) achieved the strongest distributional alignment among the evaluated synthetic MRI generators.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于小波融合变分自编码器（WF-VAE）和条件3D U-Net扩散模型的多模态MRI合成方法（WFDM），用于解决多中心数据中模态覆盖不均的问题，并在分布对齐方面取得最优效果。
AI.motivation: 多模态MRI数据在公共数据集中存在模态覆盖不均、异质性大、元数据稀疏等问题，现有合成方法多局限于窄模态或同质数据集，难以适用于大规模异构神经影像资源。
AI.method: 结合WF-VAE潜压缩器与条件3D U-Net扩散模型，在学习的3D潜空间中进行显式的模态和元数据条件生成。
AI.result: 所提出的WFDM在评估的所有合成MRI生成器中取得了最强的分布对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: WFDM通过潜空间扩散与显式条件控制，有效解决了大规模异构神经影像中模态不平衡问题，生成质量优于现有方法。

title: The Case for Model Science: Verify, Explore, Steer, Refine
summary: We argue that the AI community is now ready to move beyond benchmarking and consolidate scattered efforts in model analysis into a systematic discipline, a direction we term Model Science. Complex AI models now serve billions of users, yet our understanding of how they work lags far behind our ability to deploy them. Decades of benchmark-driven research have delivered remarkable progress: extensive leaderboards, a wide range of performance metrics, tracking capability gains across diverse tasks; yet this success has also revealed the limits of benchmarks as they tell us whether models perform but not why they succeed or fail, they miss critical failure modes, such as hallucinations or shortcuts. Precedents from established sciences point the way forward: cognitive science shows that understanding complex systems requires complementary levels of analysis; neuroscience demonstrates that deep study of single cases reveals what population studies miss; medicine teaches that specialised training must develop alongside research practice; and agriculture models how shared infrastructure and principles enable cumulative progress. These lessons inform three foundations for Model Science. First, we propose to consolidate research around four functional perspectives: Verify, Explore, Steer, and Refine that address complementary questions about model behaviour. Second, we discuss the required infrastructure for cumulative knowledge: catalogues of datasets, models and findings. Third, we highlight the need for deep analysis of individual model instances, not just model families, because single cases can reveal what population studies miss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI领域应超越基准评测，建立“模型科学”（Model Science）这一系统化学科，通过四个功能视角（验证、探索、引导、优化）、基础设施建设和深度个案分析来系统理解复杂AI模型的行为。
AI.motivation: 当前基准驱动的AI研究虽然取得了显著进展，但存在根本性局限：基准只能告诉我们模型“表现如何”，却无法解释模型“为何成功或失败”；同时基准会遗漏诸如幻觉、捷径等关键失败模式。AI模型已服务数十亿用户，但我们对模型内部工作机制的理解远落后于部署能力，亟需建立系统化的模型分析学科。
AI.method: 论文借鉴认知科学、神经科学、医学和农业模型等成熟学科的先例，提出三个基础：1）将研究整合为四个互补功能视角——验证（Verify）、探索（Explore）、引导（Steer）和优化（Refine）；2）构建所需的基础设施，包括数据集、模型和发现的目录；3）强调对单个模型实例进行深度分析，而不仅是模型家族层面的研究。
AI.result: 提出了“模型科学”这一新方向的系统性框架，包括四功能视角、基础设施建设和深度个案分析的三大支柱，为AI领域的模型分析提供了清晰的学科化路径。
AI.conclusion: AI社区已准备好超越基准评测，将分散的模型分析努力整合为系统化的“模型科学”学科，从而更全面地理解复杂AI模型的行为和机制。

title: Thinking Economically: A Hierarchical Framework for Adaptive-Complexity Reasoning in LLMs
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has significantly enhanced LLM reasoning, yet often incurs substantial computational overhead due to "overthinking": generating excessively long rationales without commensurate accuracy gains. Existing efficiency methods typically apply uniform compression, which overlooks a critical observation that reasoning complexity is heterogeneous at two distinct granularity: across different problems and within individual reasoning steps. This motivates our principle of Thinking Economically: intelligently allocating computational resources based on intrinsic task and step demands rather than pursuing uniform brevity. We propose Hierarchical Adaptive Budgeter (HAB), a training framework that operationalizes this principle through coarse-to-fine budgeting. At the inter-step level, HAB predicts the optimal reasoning depth for each problem. At the intra-step level, HAB learns step-specific token budgeting signals from PPL-derived step comparisons and an adaptive Pareto optimization objective that captures the local quality-efficiency trade-off, while a Fisher Information-based pruner further provides fine-grained training-time guidance, thereby encouraging the generator to internalize more economical reasoning patterns. Experiments on GSM8K and MATH500 show that HAB not only surpasses standard CoT in accuracy but also reduces token usage, achieving a stronger performance-efficiency trade-off than the compared baselines.

AI.tldr: HAB是一个分层自适应预算框架，通过粗到细的预算分配（跨问题预测推理深度+步骤内自适应token预算）提升LLM推理效率，在GSM8K和MATH500上超越标准CoT并减少token使用。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT方法存在"过度思考"问题（产生过长推理链但精度提升有限），而现有效率方法采用统一压缩，忽略了推理复杂度在问题粒度和步骤粒度上的异质性。
AI.method: 提出Hierarchical Adaptive Budgeter (HAB)，包含两步：1) 跨步骤层面：预测每个问题的最优推理深度；2) 步骤内层面：从PPL导出的步骤比较中学习步骤特定token预算信号，结合自适应帕累托优化目标捕捉局部质量-效率权衡，并使用基于Fisher信息的剪枝器提供细粒度训练指导。
AI.result: 在GSM8K和MATH500上，HAB不仅超过标准CoT的准确率，还减少了token使用量，实现了比对比基线更强的性能-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 验证了"经济思考"原则的有效性：根据任务和步骤的内在需求智能分配计算资源，而非追求统一的简洁性，能够更好地平衡推理质量与效率。

title: FROST-STA: Frozen Dense Features for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation
summary: Short-term anticipation in egocentric video requires more than recognizing the current scene: a system must infer which object the camera wearer will contact, which action will follow, and how soon the contact will happen. This report describes FROST-STA, our submission to the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation (STA) Challenge at EgoVis 2026. For each query time, the model produces a ranked set of structured hypotheses containing an active-object box, noun label, verb label, time-to-contact (TTC), and confidence. FROST-STA builds on the V-JEPA 2.1 STA evaluation protocol, but adapts it to the challenge by using object-centric decoding, multi-head prediction, and a submission-oriented training and ensembling recipe. We keep the V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-G backbone fixed and extract two dense token streams: video tokens from a short clip resized to 384 pixels before the query, and image tokens from the last observed high-resolution frame. A compact alignment module, consisting of an attentive probe and frame-guided temporal pooling, maps the clip representation onto the spatial reference of the final frame before fusing it with image features. The fused maps are decoded by Faster R-CNN-style STA heads that estimate box offsets, nouns, verbs, TTC values, and interaction quality. For the final leaderboard entry, we train for 25 epochs with the official training split plus additional permitted validation annotations, and combine predictions across eight heads and checkpoints from epochs 15-25. FROST-STA obtains 5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP on the official test server, ranking second in the challenge and showing that frozen dense image-video features can serve as a strong basis for object-level interaction forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FROST-STA模型，基于V-JEPA 2.1骨干网络，采用对象中心解码、多头预测和集成训练策略，在Ego4D短期物体交互预测挑战中排名第二，获得5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP。
AI.motivation: 在自我中心视频中，短期预测需要推断用户将接触哪个对象、执行什么动作以及接触何时发生，这超越了单纯的场景识别。
AI.method: 保持V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-G骨干网络固定，提取视频令牌和图像令牌两个密集流；通过注意力探针和帧引导的时间池化模块对齐融合；使用Faster R-CNN风格的STA头解码边界框偏移、名词、动词、TTC和交互质量；采用8个头和15-25轮次检查点的集成预测。
AI.result: 在官方测试集上获得5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP，排名挑战赛第二。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的密集图像-视频特征可以作为物体级交互预测的强有力基础。

title: Can LLM Agents Sustain Long-Horizon Organizational Dynamics?
summary: Large language agents are increasingly used for social simulation, yet it remains unclear whether they can sustain coherent behavior in structured organizations, where goals must propagate through hierarchy, tasks depend on prior execution, and artifacts accumulate over long horizons. We formulate long-horizon organizational simulation as a memory-centered coordination problem and introduce TaskWeave, a hierarchical agentic framework that maintains planning states through a Formulate-Partition-Diagnose-Align cycle and grounds execution through dependency-aware trace memory. We evaluate TaskWeave in a year-long IT company simulation and compare it with other multi-agent frameworks on organizational coherence, execution grounding, and downstream enterprise NLP utility. Experiments show that TaskWeave supports coherent and long-horizon organizational dynamics while producing grounded artifacts and adapting to external environments. These findings suggest that structured simulation memory is a key mechanism for building reliable LLM-based organizational simulators.

AI.tldr: 提出TaskWeave框架，通过结构化记忆机制实现大规模语言代理在长周期组织模拟中的连贯行为。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言代理在结构化组织中进行长周期模拟时，难以维持连贯行为，目标需通过层级传播、任务依赖执行、工件长期累积，但缺乏有效的记忆协调机制。
AI.method: 将长周期组织模拟形式化为以记忆为中心的协调问题，提出TaskWeave层级智能体框架，采用"制定-分解-诊断-对齐"循环维护规划状态，并通过依赖感知的轨迹记忆来支撑执行。
AI.result: 在为期一年的IT公司模拟中，TaskWeave在组织连贯性、执行落地性和下游企业NLP效用方面优于其他多智能体框架。
AI.conclusion: 结构化模拟记忆是构建可靠的大语言模型组织模拟器的关键机制。

title: CA-BED: Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at static reasoning tasks, yet their performance often degrades in interactive scenarios where information must be actively acquired through questioning. A key challenge lies in selecting questions that reduce uncertainty while incorporating responses that may be ambiguous or only partially informative. To address this, we propose Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED), an inference-time probabilistic dialog planning framework that integrates Bayesian Experimental Design with LLM-based likelihood estimation to optimize question selection over multiple conversational turns. CA-BED maintains a belief distribution over hypotheses, anticipates possible answers, and propagates expected information gain through a simulated conversation tree. Across two structured entity-deduction benchmarks, CA-BED yields an average 21.8% improvement in success rates over direct prompting, with comparable gains relative to alternative information-seeking methods. It achieves these gains with an average increase of only 1.8 conversational turns compared to direct prompting.

AI.tldr: 提出CA-BED框架，通过贝叶斯实验设计与LLM结合，在交互式对话中优化问题选择，在实体推理任务上成功率提升21.8%，对话轮次仅增加1.8。
AI.motivation: LLM在静态推理任务中表现出色，但在需要主动获取信息的交互场景中性能下降，关键在于如何选择能降低不确定性且能处理模糊回答的问题。
AI.method: 提出CA-BED（对话感知贝叶斯实验设计），在推理阶段进行概率对话规划，结合贝叶斯实验设计与基于LLM的似然估计，维护假设信念分布，模拟对话树来传播期望信息增益。
AI.result: 在两个结构化实体推理基准上，相比直接提示成功率平均提升21.8%，与其他信息获取方法相比也有相当增益，对话轮次仅增加1.8轮。
AI.conclusion: CA-BED通过概率性对话规划有效提升了LLM在交互式信息获取场景中的表现，以少量额外对话成本换取了显著的性能提升。

title: VICR: Visual In-Context Restoration for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) requires balancing structural fidelity to degraded observations with realistic detail synthesis. However, existing generative Real-ISR methods often rely on entangled conditioning mechanisms, leading to structural drift or semantically inconsistent details. To address this issue, we propose Visual In-Context Restoration (VICR), a Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based framework that formulates Real-ISR as image completion. Specifically, we introduce a decoupled visual prior injection mechanism that derives local and global cues from the low-quality (LQ) image: local cues help recover image structures and support high-frequency detail synthesis, while global cues guide overall generation and promote semantic consistency. For ambiguous regions under severe degradation, VICR employs an inference-time agent to refine semantic prompts using visual evidence from the LQ input while keeping model parameters fixed. Experiments show that VICR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple Real-ISR benchmarks with only 127M trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: VICR是一种基于扩散Transformer的视觉上下文恢复框架，通过解耦的视觉先验注入机制将真实图像超分任务重构为图像补全问题，在仅127M参数量下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式Real-ISR方法依赖纠缠的条件机制，导致结构偏移或语义不一致的细节生成问题。
AI.method: 提出VICR框架，采用DiT架构将Real-ISR建模为图像补全；设计解耦视觉先验注入机制，从低质量图像中分别提取局部和全局线索；针对严重退化区域，使用推理时代理基于LQ视觉证据优化语义提示。
AI.result: 在多个Real-ISR基准上达到最先进性能，仅需127M可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: 解耦视觉先验注入机制能有效平衡结构保真度与细节真实性，是解决生成式Real-ISR中结构-语义矛盾的有效方案。

title: The Shape of Wisdom: Decision Trajectories in Language Models
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Code and derived artifacts: https://github.com/gut-puncture/The-Shape-of-Wisdom
summary: Language models do not simply choose an answer at the output layer. In a 9,000-trajectory MMLU study across Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, and Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, the score of the answer moves across depth in structured ways. We describe each trajectory with three quantities: the current answer margin, the next-layer change in that margin, and the distance from a decision flip. The main empirical picture is that correctness and stability are different: the largest group is unstable-correct, not stable-correct. A traced subset then asks what moves the margin. In stable-correct cases, the average attention scalar points in the correct direction, while the average MLP scalar does not; span deletion shows that removing answer-supporting text hurts the margin and removing distractor-like text helps it. The result is not a full circuit explanation. It is a reproducible way to see which answers are settled, which remain fragile, and which measured sources move them.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析三种主流大语言模型在MMLU任务上的9000条推理轨迹，发现答案的正确性与稳定性是分离的：最大群体是"不稳定正确"而非"稳定正确"。研究进一步追踪了影响答案边际的因素，发现注意力机制和MLP在不同情况下扮演不同角色。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注模型最终输出的答案正确性，但忽略了答案在模型内部推理过程中的稳定性和动态变化。本文旨在揭示模型内部推理轨迹中答案边际的变化规律，区分"正确性"与"稳定性"两个不同维度。
AI.method: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct和Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3三个7B级模型上，收集9000条MMLU推理轨迹。用三个量描述每条轨迹：当前答案边际、下一层边际变化量、距离决策翻转的距离。进一步通过span删除实验探究注意力机制和MLP对边际的影响。
AI.result: 答案正确性与稳定性是分离的，最大群体是"不稳定正确"而非"稳定正确"。在稳定正确案例中，平均注意力标量指向正确方向，但平均MLP标量指向相反方向。移除支持答案的文本会损害边际，移除干扰性文本则有助于边际提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种可复现的方法来观察答案是否已"稳定"、哪些答案仍然"脆弱"，以及哪些可测量的因素在推动答案变化。虽然不构成完整的电路解释，但为理解模型内部推理动态提供了新的视角。

title: Low-Resource Safety Failures Are Action Failures, Not Representation Failures
summary: Safety alignment learned in high-resource languages transfers poorly to low-resource languages. Models refuse harmful prompts in English but fail to refuse when the same prompts are translated into Swahili or Burmese. Adaptive steering methods like AdaSteer and CAST inherit this failure cross-lingually. We diagnose where transfer breaks down. Across Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, and Llama-3.1-8B on 23 languages, the harmfulness direction extracted from high-resource activations linearly separates harmful from harmless low-resource prompts nearly as well as high-resource ones. The relevant representation is present. Yet harmful refusal drops from 87.9% to 43.9%. The model fails to convert the representation into refusal. What fails to transfer is calibration of the safety decision, not the underlying representation. We exploit this by recalibrating, rather than retraining, a high-resource gate: a low-rank logistic readout with its decision threshold reset using as few as 1 to 4 target-language examples per class. The gate routes between refusal steering and harmfulness-direction ablation, substantially raising mean refusal selectivity ($Δ$ = harmful $-$ harmless refusal) from 33.6 for the strongest adapted baseline to 54.5 while preserving MMLU utility. These results suggest that some low-resource safety failures can be repaired by recalibrating existing representations rather than learning new ones. Our code is released: https://github.com/rashadaziz/low-resource-safety.

AI.tldr: 多语言安全对齐中，高资源语言习得的安全表征在低资源语言中依然存在，但决策校准（而非表征本身）未能跨语言迁移。通过重新校准高资源语言的逻辑回归阈值（仅需每类1-4个样本），即可显著提升低资源语言的拒绝有害内容能力，选择性从33.6提升至54.5。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐在高资源语言（如英语）中表现良好，但在低资源语言（如斯瓦希里语、缅甸语）中拒绝有害内容的能力大幅下降，且现有自适应方法（如AdaSteer、CAST）未能解决这一问题。论文旨在诊断跨语言安全转移失败的根本原因。
AI.method: 在Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B和Llama-3.1-8B三种模型上，使用23种语言进行实验。首先分析高资源语言中提取的有害方向表征是否也能线性分离低资源语言的有害/无害样本；发现表征存在但模型未将其转化为拒绝行为。提出基于低秩逻辑回归的重新校准方法，仅需每类1-4个目标语言样本重置决策阈值，用于路由拒绝引导与有害方向消融之间的选择。
AI.result: 高资源语言提取的有害方向在低资源语言中线性分离有害/无害样本的能力几乎一样好，但拒绝率从87.9%下降到43.9%。重新校准后，平均拒绝选择性（有害-无害拒绝率差值）从33.6提升至54.5，同时保持MMLU效用不变。
AI.conclusion: 低资源语言的安全失败可以通过重新校准现有表征而非学习新表征来修复。代码已开源。

title: CR-JEPA: Cross-Modal Joint-Embedding Predictive Learning for Remote Sensing Image Retrieval
summary: Cross-modal remote sensing image retrieval aims to retrieve semantically related scenes across heterogeneous sensing modalities. This remains challenging because paired observations may differ substantially in imaging physics, spatial resolution, spectral configuration, and visual appearance. Moreover, a single retrieval projection trained with one objective may be insufficient to jointly support cross-modal semantic alignment and same-modal neighbourhood preservation. We propose CR-JEPA, a Cross-modal Retrieval Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for dual-modality remote sensing retrieval. The model uses modality-specific stems, a shared transformer trunk, and JEPA-style predictive objectives to estimate masked latent target features within and across modalities. Inspired by LeJEPA, we apply Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization to raw retrieval projections to stabilize embeddings and mitigate collapse. CR-JEPA further employs a decoupled-head design with a unified retrieval head for same-modal retrieval and a cross-modal retrieval head for cross-modal search. We evaluate CR-JEPA on BEN-14K, CBRSIR_VS, and DSRSID. On BEN-14K, CR-JEPA improves S1 to S2 retrieval from 61.23% to 75.82% and S2 to S1 retrieval from 63.73% to 75.40% over X-JEPA, while also achieving competitive same-modal retrieval with fewer parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种跨模态遥感图像检索模型CR-JEPA，通过联合嵌入预测架构、素描各向同性高斯正则化和解耦头设计，显著提升了跨模态检索性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态遥感图像检索中，不同模态的图像在物理成像、空间分辨率、光谱配置和视觉外观上差异显著，且单一检索投影难以同时支持跨模态语义对齐和同模态邻域保持。
AI.method: 提出了CR-JEPA模型，采用模态特定主干网络、共享Transformer主干、JEPA式预测目标（跨模态和同模态掩码潜在特征预测）、素描各向同性高斯正则化稳定嵌入，以及解耦头设计（统一检索头用于同模态检索，跨模态检索头用于跨模态搜索）。
AI.result: 在BEN-14K数据集上，S1→S2检索从61.23%提升至75.82%，S2→S1检索从63.73%提升至75.40%，同时以更少参数实现了有竞争力的同模态检索性能。
AI.conclusion: CR-JEPA通过联合嵌入预测架构和正则化策略，有效解决了跨模态遥感检索中的语义对齐和嵌入稳定问题，显著优于基线方法。

title: Advanced Mathematics Learning Behavior Prediction and Academic Early Warning Model Based on Multimodal Data Analysis
summary: Early detection of at-risk students and timely academic intervention pose major challenges in advanced mathematics education, where complex conceptual hierarchies and nonlinear learning trajectories often hold back students' academic performance. This study adopts multimodal data analytics to build a dynamic framework for learning behavior prediction and academic early warning. It constructs a hierarchical knowledge graph ontology, realizes adaptive edge weighting according to problem difficulty and student performance, and combines heterogeneous graph attention with temporal sequence modeling to capture students' evolving knowledge states. Empirical tests on semester-long multimodal datasets prove that this method can accurately identify high-risk students and effectively track error propagation. Targeted interventions greatly improve students' knowledge mastery and reduce academic risks. The results verify that integrating knowledge graph analytics with multimodal temporal modeling can deliver more efficient and personalized learning support for advanced mathematics education.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多模态数据分析和知识图谱的动态框架，用于预测高等数学教育中存在学业风险的学生，并实现早期预警。该方法通过分层知识图谱本体、自适应边权重、异构图注意力机制和时序建模，能够准确识别高风险学生并追踪错误传播路径，干预后显著提升学生知识掌握度。
AI.motivation: 高等数学教育中，学生因复杂的概念层次结构和非线性学习轨迹，常出现学业落后问题，而早期发现高风险学生并及时干预是一大挑战。
AI.method: 构建分层知识图谱本体，根据题目难度和学生表现实现自适应边权重；结合异构图注意力机制与时序序列建模，捕捉学生动态知识状态。
AI.result: 在学期多模态数据集上，该方法能准确识别高风险学生，有效追踪错误传播路径；实施靶向干预后，学生知识掌握度明显提升，学业风险降低。
AI.conclusion: 将知识图谱分析与多模态时序建模相结合，能够为高等数学教育提供更高效、个性化的学习支持。

title: Implicit Geographic Inference in LLM Medical Triage: Language-Driven Disparities in Emergency Recommendations
comment: 7 pages, 4 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/wongqihan/ai-behavioral-experiments
summary: We investigate whether large language models produce different medical triage recommendations for identical symptoms based solely on the language of the patient prompt. Using Gemini 3.5 Flash, we evaluate a neurological symptom profile (persistent headache, blurred vision, nausea) across six languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Hindi, Japanese, Arabic) with 30 runs per condition (n=450 total API calls). We find that the model recommends emergency room visits at rates ranging from 0% (Japanese, Hindi) to 30% (English, Arabic), despite assigning nearly identical severity scores (7.7-8.0/10) across all languages. Adding a single sentence specifying the patient's US location increases ER recommendations by up to 76.7 percentage points for non-English prompts, while the reverse anchor (English prompt with a Tokyo location) reduces the ER rate from 30% to 6.7%. A back-translation control (Japanese to English) produces ER rates comparable to the English baseline, confirming that the disparity is not caused by translation quality but by implicit geographic inference from the input language. We release the complete dataset, experiment code, and results.

AI.tldr: 大语言模型在分诊建议中存在语言偏差：患者使用不同语言描述相同症状时，模型推荐的急诊就医率从0%（日语、印地语）到30%（英语、阿拉伯语）不等，且语言隐含的地理信息比翻译质量更能解释这一差异。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型是否仅因患者使用的语言不同，就对相同症状给出不同的医疗分诊建议。
AI.method: 使用Gemini 3.5 Flash，对同一神经系统症状（持续性头痛、视力模糊、恶心）在6种语言（英、西、中、印、日、阿）下各进行30次测试（共450次API调用），并加入地理位置锚定和回译对照实验。
AI.result: 急诊推荐率跨语言差异显著（0%-30%）；加入"患者在美国"后非英语提示的急诊率提升最高达76.7个百分点；英语提示+东京定位使急诊率从30%降至6.7%；回译控制实验确认差异源于语言隐含的地理推断而非翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在医疗分诊中存在语言偏差，该偏差主要由模型根据输入语言推断患者地理位置所致，而非翻译质量差异。

title: CASTLE2026 Team WDL Technical Report
summary: The CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026 evaluates long-form egocentric video question answering over 600+ hours of multi-perspective recordings. Each four-choice question requires evidence from videos, transcripts, auxiliary photos, people, days, rooms, and temporal context. We propose an evidence-aware multimodal reasoning pipeline based on Qwen. Our system parses question hints, retrieves ASR chunks, attaches auxiliary images, samples candidate video frames, and routes questions into static visual, speech/text, temporal, and mixed types with specialized prompts. Multiple inference passes are aggregated by confidence-weighted voting and converted into the official Codabench format. In ablation, LoRA improves the score from 0.21 to 0.50, and more sampled frames further raise it to 0.58. Our final system ranks first in the CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Qwen的证据感知多模态推理流程，在CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026的600小时以上多视角自我中心视频问答任务中，通过提示解析、ASR检索、辅助图像附加、候选帧采样及问题分类等步骤，结合LoRA微调和置信度加权投票，以0.58分获得第一名。
AI.motivation: CASTLE Challenge需要处理600小时以上的多视角自我中心视频，每个四选一问题需要从视频、文本、辅助照片、人物、时间、地点等多维度证据中推理答案，现有方法难以有效整合这些异构证据来源。
AI.method: 基于Qwen构建证据感知多模态流程：解析问题提示→检索ASR文本块→附加辅助图像→采样候选视频帧→将问题分为静态视觉、语音/文本、时序和混合四类并分别设计专用提示→多次推理后通过置信度加权投票聚合结果。
AI.result: LoRA微调将分数从0.21提升至0.50，增加采样帧数后进一步升至0.58，最终在CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 证据感知的多模态推理流程能够有效整合视频、文本、图像等多源异构证据，LoRA微调和充足的帧采样显著提升性能。

title: Application of Algorithms in Energy-Efficient Design Platforms for Green Building
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures.2026 International Conference on Big Data Applications in Education and Engineering (ICBDAEE 2026)
summary: During green building design, computer-aided energy assessment is widely used to improve efficiency and achieve overall optimization. This paper presents a platform that combines Building Information Modeling (BIM), sensor operational data, and advanced simulation workflows using robust algorithms. The platform uses a multi-layer service architecture with dynamic energy simulation and evolutionary multi-objective optimization, connected via a high-performance C++ core and adaptive agent models. A mid-rise office building was selected as the case study. Five representative areas were chosen to collect data on building envelope characteristics and occupancy patterns. After preprocessing, missing sensor data accounted for 3.2% of annual records, and all variables were standardized using 15-minute interpolation. After 40 optimization rounds, annual energy consumption per square meter dropped by 29.3% from 315 kWh/m2 to 223 kWh/m2. The lifecycle cost increase for occupants was limited to 3.7%, and discomfort hours were reduced to under 70 hours per year. Analysis of Pareto optimal solutions shows that the envelope U-value ranges from 1.05 to 1.57 W/m2K, and nighttime ventilation rate ranges from 2.1 to 3.6 h-1, both closely linked to energy performance. The results confirm that the integrated algorithm framework offers good scalability, strong performance, and technical feasibility for green building design. This platform provides a reliable decision-support tool for design engineers and sustainability practitioners, enabling accurate, data-driven delivery of energy-efficient buildings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个融合BIM、传感器数据与先进算法的绿色建筑设计平台，通过40轮优化使年能耗降低29.3%，生命周期成本仅增3.7%，不舒适小时数低于70小时/年，验证了该集成框架的可扩展性与技术可行性。
AI.motivation: 绿色建筑设计需要提高能源评估效率并实现整体优化，现有方法在数据集成和优化能力上存在不足，因此需要开发一个结合BIM、传感器数据与先进仿真优化的综合平台。
AI.method: 采用多层服务架构，集成BIM建模、传感器运行数据与高级仿真工作流；使用高性能C++核心与自适应智能体模型；通过动态能量模拟与进化多目标优化进行40轮迭代；对中型办公楼5个代表性区域进行15分钟插值标准化预处理。
AI.result: 年能耗从315 kWh/m²降至223 kWh/m²（降幅29.3%）；生命周期成本增幅控制在3.7%；不舒适小时数低于70小时/年；Pareto最优解显示围护结构U值1.05-1.57 W/m²K，夜间通风率2.1-3.6 h⁻¹。
AI.conclusion: 该集成算法框架具有良好的可扩展性、强劲的性能和技术可行性，为设计工程师和可持续从业者提供了可靠的数据驱动决策支持工具。

title: DiscourseFlip: An Oblique Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation Attack against Black-box Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are widely deployed and increasingly influential, but their reliance on external corpora exposes new security risks from poisoned retrieval content. Existing RAG attacks are largely focusing on individual queries or narrow topic-local query sets, which limits their practical reach and offers limited camouflage in real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce discourse-level opinion manipulation, a new threat model in which coordinated influence across a semantic query network induces opinion shifts over a holistic, multi-topic query space. We formalize this threat in a black-box setting and propose DiscourseFlip, an agentic, graph-guided attack that dynamically allocates a limited poisoning budget to maximize discourse-level opinion deviation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiscourseFlip consistently induces targeted opinion shifts across the contextualized query network and significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of coverage and effectiveness. User studies further confirm that DiscourseFlip is effective while remaining well camouflaged from user detection. Moreover, systematic analyses show that existing mitigation strategies are ineffective against discourse-level manipulation, underscoring the urgent need for more robust and adaptive defenses to address discourse-level vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DiscourseFlip，一种针对检索增强生成（RAG）系统的语篇级观点操纵攻击，通过在语义查询网络中动态分配中毒预算，实现多主题空间上的观点偏移，现有防御手段对此无效。
AI.motivation: 现有 RAG 攻击主要针对单条查询或窄主题集，实用范围有限且伪装性差；亟需研究更具隐蔽性和覆盖面的语篇级观点操纵威胁。
AI.method: 提出 DiscourseFlip，一种基于智能体和图引导的攻击方法，在黑盒设置下将有限的中毒预算动态分配至语义查询网络，最大化语篇级观点偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明 DiscourseFlip 能持续诱导目标观点偏移，在覆盖率和有效性上显著优于基线方法；用户研究证实其攻击有效且难以被察觉。
AI.conclusion: 现有防御策略无法有效抵御语篇级操纵，亟需开发更鲁棒的自适应防御机制以应对此类新威胁。

title: Scaling Parallel Sequence Models to Foundation-Scale Vision Encoders
summary:
Vision foundation models are bottlenecked by the quadratic cost of self-attention, which limits usable resolution and increases the cost of large-scale pretraining. Subquadratic alternatives such as linear attention and state-space models reduce this cost, but often serialize images into 1D token streams and weaken the 2D spatial structure important for vision. Generalized Spatial Propagation Networks (GSPN) instead propagate context directly on the 2D grid through line-scan recurrences, achieving near-linear complexity without positional embeddings, but have seen little use as foundation-scale encoders.
  We present C-GSPN, a foundation-scale vision encoder based on 2D spatial propagation. C-GSPN makes the operator practical through three improvements: (1) a fast GSPN CUDA kernel that fuses per-step launches into a single warp-specialized implementation with shared-memory tiling, coalesced access, and a compact multi-channel propagation, reaching over 90% of peak memory bandwidth and running up to 40--52x faster than the original GSPN implementation; (2) a compressed latent-space propagation block with fused normalization, which turns kernel-level speed into block- and model-level efficiency; and (3) a two-stage cross-operator distillation recipe that trains the new architecture from an attention teacher without the cost of from-scratch foundation-scale training. Distilled with 600M image-text pairs, C-GSPN matches an isomorphic ViT baseline with 15% fewer parameters, improves ADE20K segmentation by +2.1%, transfers to high resolution with a fraction of the data needed from scratch, and delivers a 4x end-to-end block speedup at 2K with single-pass, tiling-free inference.

AI.tldr: C-GSPN是一种基于2D空间传播的视觉基础模型编码器，通过快速CUDA内核、压缩潜在空间传播和跨算子蒸馏，以亚二次复杂度实现了与ViT相当甚至更优的性能，并带来4倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 视觉基础模型受限于自注意力的二次复杂度，限制了可用分辨率和增加了大规模预训练成本。现有的亚二次替代方案（如线性注意力、状态空间模型）往往将图像序列化为1D token流，削弱了视觉任务中重要的2D空间结构。GSPN虽能保持2D结构并实现近线性复杂度，但尚未被用作基础模型规模的编码器。
AI.method: (1) 快速GSPN CUDA内核：融合逐步启动为单一warp-specialized实现，采用共享内存分块、合并访问和紧凑多通道传播，达到峰值内存带宽90%以上，速度提升40-52倍；(2) 压缩潜在空间传播块：融合归一化操作，将内核级加速转化为块级和模型级效率；(3) 两阶段跨算子蒸馏方法：从注意力教师模型训练新架构，避免从头开始的大规模预训练成本。
AI.result: 使用6亿图像-文本对进行蒸馏后，C-GSPN以少于15%的参数匹配同构ViT基线，在ADE20K分割任务上提升+2.1%，能以极少量数据迁移到高分辨率，在2K分辨率下实现4倍端到端块加速，且推理时无需分块。
AI.conclusion: C-GSPN通过工程优化和蒸馏策略，成功将2D空间传播算子扩展至基础模型规模，在保持近线性复杂度和2D结构优势的同时，实现了与注意力模型相当甚至更优的性能，为视觉基础模型提供了高效可行的替代方案。

title: HomeFlow: A Data Flywheel for Smart Home Agent Training with Verifiable Simulation
