TECCI consists of a completely new set of images we are releasing. The images in TECCI span 7 image categories. The images and these categories were curated intentionally to target weaknesses of existing methods. The edit instructions in TECCI are automatically generated by Gemini, covering 5 edit types per source image. We also curated a set of 530 images for which we created challenging manually written edit instructions. Overall, TECCI contains 7550 pairs of images and edit instructions. We conduct human evaluations of five leading image editing models on TECCI. Humans judge outputs along three dimensions: 1) instruction following, 2) minimality of the edits, and 3) visual quality. To scale-up the evaluation, we also build an auto-rater using Gemini that achieves 74.7% accuracy in matching human evaluations. Our evaluations reveal that: 1) none of the models exceed a 22% overall success rate, demonstrating the challenging nature of TECCI, 2) Nano Banana Pro is the best performing model overall, 3) models perform significantly better at instruction following compared to minimal edits and visual quality, 4) models struggle with editing architecture and nature images which require strong understanding of spatial layout and intricate visual details. 5) reasoning and creative edits are the most difficult, whereas color and appearance edits are the easiest.

AI.tldr: 提出了TECCI基准，包含7550对具有挑战性的图像和编辑指令，发现现有5个领先模型在指令遵循、最小编辑和视觉质量三个维度上整体成功率均未超过22%。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑方法在指令遵循、最小化编辑源图像和确保高视觉质量方面仍存在诸多困难，尤其是在涉及位置、运动、视角、尺度和创意编辑等复杂任务时表现不佳，缺乏一个系统性的基准来测试这些方法的弱点。
AI.method: 构建TECCI基准：包含7个图像类别的新数据集，由Gemini自动生成的5种编辑类型指令，以及530张图像的人工编写挑战性指令；使用人类评价和Gemini自动评估器（准确率74.7%）从三个维度进行评测。
AI.result: 所有模型总体成功率低于22%；Nano Banana Pro表现最佳；模型在指令遵循上显著优于最小编辑和视觉质量；在建筑和自然图像上表现困难；推理和创意编辑最难，颜色和外观编辑最易。
AI.conclusion: 当前图像编辑方法在复杂编辑任务上仍远未令人满意，TECCI基准揭示了现有方法的系统性弱点，为未来研究提供了明确方向。

title: RL-ACRGNet: Reinforcement Learning-Based Chest Radiology Report Generation Network
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Medical imaging interpretation is a foundational pillar of modern clinical diagnostics, yet the manual generation of radiology reports remains a time-consuming process prone to interpretation inconsistencies. Within the field of medical AI, automating these descriptions through deep learning promises to streamline clinical workflows and standardise diagnostic output. However, accurate disease detection and precise report generation remain significant challenges due to limitations in capturing fine-grained visual features and ensuring clinical coherence. To address these issues, we propose RL-ACRGNet, an improved encoder-decoder model that integrates a pre-trained DenseNet encoder with a multilevel LSTM decoder within an off-policy reinforcement learning framework. Using a dual-network approach to refine visual-semantic embeddings through a metric-based reward mechanism, we demonstrate that RL-ACRGNet consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on the IU-Xray dataset, achieving quantitative improvements in BLEU-4 (0.47%), METEOR (0.17%) and ROUGE-L (0.518). Furthermore, comprehensive evaluations on the large-scale MIMIC-CXR data set confirm the robust generalisation of the model and its ability to generate high-quality, clinically relevant reports

AI.tldr: 本文提出RL-ACRGNet模型，结合预训练DenseNet编码器与多级LSTM解码器，在离线强化学习框架下通过度量奖励机制优化视觉语义嵌入，在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上实现了优于现有方法的报告生成性能。
AI.motivation: 手动生成放射学报告耗时且存在解释不一致问题，现有自动化方法在捕捉细粒度视觉特征和保证临床连贯性方面仍面临显著挑战。
AI.method: 采用改进的编码器-解码器结构，集成预训练DenseNet编码器与多级LSTM解码器，在离线强化学习框架中通过双网络结构和度量奖励机制优化视觉语义嵌入，以提升疾病检测准确性和报告生成质量。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray数据集上，BLEU-4提升0.47%、METEOR提升0.17%、ROUGE-L提升0.518；在MIMIC-CXR大规模数据集上验证了模型的强泛化能力和高质量的临床报告生成能力。
AI.conclusion: RL-ACRGNet通过强化学习和双网络奖励机制有效提升了医学影像报告自动生成的准确性和临床相关性，为临床工作流程标准化提供了可行方案。

title: What to Format and How: A Benchmark and Workflow Approach for Document Formatting
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened up new possibilities for automated document formatting. However, real-world formatting often requires identifying targets based on document content. This content-aware setting remains challenging and underexplored, primarily due to the lack of dedicated evaluation datasets.To enable evaluation in realistic content-aware scenarios, we introduce DocFormBench, a benchmark that extends Text-to-Format evaluation to diverse formatting requirements, along with metrics for both accuracy and efficiency.To mitigate redundant document reading in existing methods during formatting, we propose DocFormFlow, a workflow formatting method that decouples target localization from modification execution into what to format and how. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and multimodal models show that DocFormFlow consistently improves formatting accuracy while reducing token consumption compared to representative baselines. Further analysis reveals that precise target localization is the primary factor influencing formatting performance. We hope DocFormBench and DocFormFlow will facilitate future research toward more intelligent and reliable document formatting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocFormBench基准和DocFormFlow工作流方法，用于解决内容感知的文档格式化问题，在提升准确性的同时降低token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在内容感知的文档格式化场景中缺乏专用评估数据集，且现有方法存在冗余文档阅读问题。
AI.method: 提出DocFormBench基准（扩展Text-to-Format评估）和DocFormFlow工作流（将目标定位与修改执行解耦为"格式化什么"和"如何格式化"两个步骤）。
AI.result: DocFormFlow在多个LLM和多模态模型上持续提升格式化准确性，同时减少token消耗。
AI.conclusion: 精确的目标定位是影响格式化性能的主要因素，DocFormBench和DocFormFlow将促进更智能可靠的文档格式化研究。

title: Topological texture analysis of microscopy images of dynamic casein gelation and its relation to rheological properties
summary:
We propose a novel computational toolbox that integrates Topological Data Analysis (TDA), Differential Box Counting (DBC), Multifractal Partition (MFP), and Local Binary Patterns (LBP), applied to time-lapse super-resolution STED microscopy images of sodium caseinate gelation induced by glucono-delta-lactone (GDL) at 30 °C and 40 °C and two GDL concentrations (1.8% and 3.5% w/v).
  TDA tracked topological loops, closed ring-like structures reflecting protein network interconnectivity, via max-Betti-1 curves, which revealed a lag phase of dispersed aggregates, a sharp decay coinciding with network percolation and the rheologically observed sol-gel transition, and a post-gelation increase corresponding to network rearrangements. These topological transitions were corroborated by DBC and MFP as these methods were able to resolve changes in structural complexity and spatial heterogeneity. The toolbox was validated on simulated fractal images prior to experimental application. Together, these descriptors provided sensitivity to subtle microstructural transitions that bulk rheology captured as averaged bulk mechanical responses. This integrated approach provides a robust quantitative tool for characterizing complex microstructure in food and material science with evolving microstructural dynamics. Code is available at https://github.com/Zahratabatabaei/Delifood_CV_paper.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）、差分盒计数（DBC）、多重分形分割（MFP）和局部二值模式（LBP）的计算工具箱，用于分析酪蛋白酸钠凝胶化的超分辨率STED显微图像，成功捕捉了从聚集到凝胶网络形成的微观结构演变过程。
AI.motivation: 传统流变学方法只能测量平均化的宏观力学响应，难以捕捉凝胶化过程中细微的微观结构变化。因此需要一种能够定量表征复杂微观结构动态演变的计算工具。
AI.method: 整合TDA（通过max-Betti-1曲线追踪拓扑环）、DBC、MFP和LBP四种方法，先对模拟分形图像进行验证，再应用于不同温度（30°C和40°C）和不同GDL浓度（1.8%和3.5% w/v）条件下的酪蛋白酸钠凝胶化时间序列STED显微图像分析。
AI.result: TDA的max-Betti-1曲线清晰揭示了三个阶段：分散聚集体的滞后期、对应网络渗透和溶胶-凝胶转变的陡峭衰减期、以及反映凝胶后网络重排的上升期。DBC和MFP也成功解析了结构复杂性和空间异质性的变化。这些拓扑转变与传统流变学观测的sol-gel转变高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该综合工具箱能够提供对微妙微观结构转变的敏感性，超越了传统流变学仅能捕捉平均化力学响应的局限，为食品和材料科学中具有动态微观结构演变的体系提供了稳健的定量表征工具。

title: Eyettention II: A Dual-Sequence Architecture for Modeling Fixation Location, Within-Word Landing Position, and Fixation Duration in Reading
summary: The way our eyes move while reading provides valuable insights into both the reader's cognitive processes and the properties of the text. In particular, eye-tracking-while-reading data has shown to be highly beneficial in various technological applications, such as enhancing and interpreting language models and inferring a reader's characteristics. However, these applications often rely on large-scale, data-driven models, which demand extensive eye-tracking datasets that are challenging to obtain due to the resource-intensive nature of data collection. To address the challenge of data scarcity, we develop Eyettention II, an end-to-end trained deep-learning model capable of generating realistic scanpaths consisting of a complete set of fixation attributes in chronological order, including fixation location, within-word landing position, and fixation duration. Our model is lightweight, efficiently trainable on limited GPU resources, and closely aligned with cognitive theories. We demonstrate that Eyettention II surpasses state-of-the-art models in scanpath prediction and mirrors human-like gaze behavior by capturing key psycholinguistic phenomena. With its robust performance, Eyettention II holds the potential to drive advancements in natural language processing, facilitate piloting the materials of psycholinguistic experiments, and uncover new insights beyond what is explicitly encoded in theoretical cognitive models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Eyettention II，一种轻量级端到端深度学习模型，用于生成逼真的阅读眼动轨迹，解决了眼动追踪数据稀缺的问题，在扫描路径预测上超越现有模型。
AI.motivation: 眼动追踪数据在语言模型增强和读者特征推断等应用中价值显著，但大规模数据采集成本高昂，数据稀缺成为主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 开发了Eyettention II，一种端到端训练的深度学习模型，可生成包含注视位置、词内落点位置和注视时长等完整属性的时序扫描路径，模型轻量且可在有限GPU资源上高效训练。
AI.result: Eyettention II在扫描路径预测任务上超越了最先进模型，并能捕捉关键心理语言学现象，模拟出类人凝视行为。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有望推动自然语言处理发展，辅助心理语言学实验材料预测试，并揭示超越现有理论认知模型的新见解。

title: Analysis of Ethnic Disparities in Autism Spectrum Disorder among Toddlers
comment: Third International Conference Biomedical Engineering Science and technology
summary: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by challenges in communication and behavior. This study examines the relationship between ethnicity and ASD traits, along with behavioural scores, sex and neonatal jaundice across three ethnic groups: White Europeans, Asians, and Middle Eastern individuals. We perform a logistic regression and show that ethnicity has a significant effect on incidence of ASD. White Europeans are 81% increased risk of ASD and Middle Easterners are at 79\% reduced risk of ASD compared to Asians. We also confirm earlier studied which show that neonatal jaundice is a significant predictor of ASD, while male children are at much higher risk of ASD compared to female children. These results suggest the need for diagnostic frameworks and interventions that account for ethnic in the presentation and assessment of ASD traits

AI.tldr: 本研究通过逻辑回归分析发现，种族对自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）发病率有显著影响：白人欧洲人患ASD风险比亚洲人高81%，中东人比亚洲人低79%。同时验证了新生儿黄疸和男性性别是ASD的重要预测因素，建议诊断框架应考虑种族差异。
AI.motivation: 探究种族与ASD特征之间的关系，以及行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸等因素在不同种族群体（白人欧洲人、亚洲人、中东人）中的影响差异。
AI.method: 采用逻辑回归分析方法，对三个种族群体的ASD特征、行为评分、性别和新生儿黄疸等变量进行统计分析。
AI.result: 种族对ASD发病率有显著影响：白人欧洲人风险比亚洲人高81%，中东人比亚洲人低79%。新生儿黄疸是ASD的显著预测因子，男性儿童ASD风险远高于女性儿童。
AI.conclusion: ASD诊断框架和干预措施应考虑种族差异，以更好地适应不同族裔群体的ASD特征表现和评估需求。

title: Explainable Data-driven Deep Reinforcement Learning Methods for Optimal Energy Management in Buildings
summary: The increasing integration of renewable energy sources into power systems, particularly in buildings equipped with photovoltaic (PV) panels and energy storage systems, introduces significant complexity in energy systems. Volatile power generation, varying electricity tariffs, and increased entities, e.g., PV systems, and heat pumps, have increased the complexity and made the system harder to operate. This leads to the demand for additional control and optimization routes including data-based controls, such as reinforcement learning. While deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising solution to optimize building operations in dynamic and ever more complex environments, its black-box nature impedes user trust and practical adoption. This paper presents a framework for explainable deep reinforcement learning (XRL) applied to energy management in residential buildings. We demonstrate its usage on both synthetic data but also on real-world data from the Living Lab Energy Campus (LLEC) at KIT. We train and compare both on-policy and off-policy DRL agents on an expanded state space that incorporates real-time measurements (demand, PV generation, battery power, state of charge), external signals (dynamic electricity price, local weather data), calendrical and holiday indicators, and forecasts for demand and price. Our experimental results indicate that on-policy algorithms, particularly Advantage Actor Critic (A2C) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), outperform off-policy methods in terms of cumulative rewards and policy stability. To explain these models, we employ post-hoc interpretation techniques to elaborate the learned control policies. Our findings demonstrate that the XRL framework not only reduces electricity costs through optimal battery management, but also provides transparent, actionable insights into the agent's decision-making process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释深度强化学习（XRL）框架，用于优化住宅建筑电池储能管理，通过对比多种策略梯度算法，发现A2C和PPO等在线策略算法表现优于离线策略方法，并利用事后解释技术提升了模型决策的透明度和可信度。
AI.motivation: 随着光伏、热泵等可再生能源及动态电价引入建筑能源系统，系统复杂度急剧上升，传统控制方法难以应对；而深度强化学习虽能有效优化运行，但其黑箱特性阻碍了用户信任和实际部署。
AI.method: 构建了包含实时量测、外部信号（电价、天气）、日历/节假日指示及预测数据的扩展状态空间；训练并对比了在线策略（A2C, PPO）与离线策略DRL代理；采用事后解释技术（如特征重要性、策略可视化）分析学习到的控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明在线策略算法（尤其A2C和PPO）在累计奖励和策略稳定性方面优于离线策略方法；XRL框架不仅降低了电力成本，还提供了透明、可操作的决策洞察。
AI.conclusion: 可解释DRL框架在建筑能源管理中有效兼顾了优化性能与可解释性，增强了用户信任，为实际部署提供了可行路径。

title: Training Prompt Matters: State-Adaptive Optimization for Robust Fine-Tuning
summary: While prompt engineering is instrumental in maximizing the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) during inference, the role of prompts during training remains critically underexplored. Prevailing fine-tuning paradigms typically treat training prompts as mere surface forms, assuming that semantically equivalent instructions yield identical learning outcomes. However, we reveal that this equivalence is deceptive: while paraphrased prompts often lead to comparable in-task performance, they induce drastically different cross-task impacts regarding catastrophic forgetting and generalization. Crucially, these impacts are positively correlated across tasks, indicating the existence of superior prompts that consistently yield better performance. Furthermore, we discover that these superior prompts can be robustly identified by task loss prior to learning. Leveraging these insights, we introduce State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO), a lightweight yet effective training strategy that shifts task formulation from a static input to a dynamic, state-adaptive variable. Comprehensive experiments on diverse benchmarks confirm its effectiveness, which significantly mitigates forgetting while improving generalization, achieving substantial performance gains over state-of-the-art methods. These results provide insights into how training prompts shape learning dynamics and offer a practical recipe for robust fine-tuning. Our code is available at https://github.com/Eric8932/SAPO.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示训练提示词（prompts）在语义等价下对跨任务影响存在显著差异，提出状态自适应提示优化（SAPO）方法，通过动态调整提示词有效缓解灾难性遗忘并提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有微调范式假设语义等价的训练提示词会带来相同的学习效果，但作者发现这一假设是错误的——虽然等价提示词在同任务上表现相似，但它们在跨任务（灾难性遗忘和泛化）上会产生截然不同的影响，而这一关键问题尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出State-Adaptive Prompt Optimization (SAPO)，一种轻量级训练策略。核心思想是将训练提示词从静态输入转变为动态的、状态自适应的变量，通过任务损失先验识别最优提示，并在训练过程中动态调整。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，SAPO能显著缓解灾难性遗忘，同时提升泛化能力，在性能上大幅超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 训练提示词对学习动力学有重要影响，SAPO提供了一种实用且高效的鲁棒微调方案，为理解提示词在训练中的作用提供了新视角。

title: Where to Look: Can Foundation Models Reach a Target Viewpoint Through Active Exploration?
summary: Humans can reproduce the viewpoint specified by a target image through active head and body motion, yet spatial intelligence in foundation models has largely been studied as passive understanding of pre-collected observations. We introduce Target Viewpoint Reproduction (TVR) -- an active task where an agent adjusts its viewpoint in a 3D environment until its observation matches a given target image -- and TVRBench, an indoor-simulation benchmark spanning scene scale and target-view visual richness. TVR is far from solved: on the evaluation split, the strongest open-source and closed-source models reach only 7.8% and 12.0% success. Fine-grained analysis identifies two consistent bottlenecks: off-the-shelf models struggle with multi-turn visual history, and performance drops sharply when viewpoint reproduction requires body translation rather than in-place rotation, exposing a gap in mapping spatial discrepancies to embodied movement. To study reducing this gap, we build a unified TVR post-training framework covering expert-trajectory SFT, rationale-supervised CoT-SFT, offline Single-turn GRPO, and on-policy Multi-turn GRPO from live simulator rollouts. Visual-action SFT supplies the main gain, raising a 9B open-source model to 50.8% success; Multi-turn GRPO provides targeted multi-room refinement and reaches 51.4% overall, while CoT supervision and Single-turn GRPO degrade closed-loop performance. These results establish TVRBench as a testbed for measuring and training foundation models that actively perceive and act in 3D environments. Our code, data, and models are available at https://github.com/aim-uofa/TVRBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出目标视角复现(TVR)任务——智能体需在3D环境中主动调整视角以匹配目标图像。构建TVRBench室内仿真基准，发现现有模型表现差(最强开源7.8%，闭源12.0%)，瓶颈在于多轮视觉历史理解和身体平移。通过专家轨迹SFT、CoT-SFT、GRPO等后训练框架，9B模型提升至51.4%成功率。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过主动移动复现目标视角，但现有基础模型的空间智能主要研究被动理解预采集数据，缺乏对主动感知和行动的评测与训练。
AI.method: 构建TVRBench室内仿真基准，设计TVR任务。提出统一后训练框架，包括专家轨迹SFT、推理监督CoT-SFT、离线单轮GRPO和在线多轮GRPO，利用模拟器实时rollout进行训练。
AI.result: 最强开源模型仅7.8%成功率，闭源GPT-4o仅12.0%。9B开源模型经视觉-动作SFT提升至50.8%，多轮GRPO达51.4%。CoT监督和单轮GRPO反而降低闭环性能。
AI.conclusion: TVRBench可作为评测和训练主动感知3D环境的基础模型的基准。现有模型在多轮视觉历史理解和身体平移方面存在关键瓶颈，视觉-动作SFT和多轮GRPO是有效训练策略。

title: eMoT: evolving Memory-of-Thought via Symbolic Anchoring and Memory Corrosion
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve impressive performance on multi-step reasoning tasks, their reliability is persistently hindered by critical limitations such as unconstrained hallucinations and poor numerical computation. Fundamentally, these issues arise because standard models treat reasoning as a transient, one-off generation process rather than retaining and refining successful procedural logic. To address these challenges, we propose eMoT (evolving Memory-of-Thought), a unified framework that stabilizes multi-step reasoning by treating reasoning trajectories as dynamic, evolving memories rather than static templates. The framework primarily consists of three interconnected modules: (i) a memory corrosion mechanism that reinforces high-utility reasoning structures while gradually decaying less frequent ones; (ii) a symbolic anchoring engine that utilizes Python for deterministic computation, much like a human uses a calculator; and (iii) a consistency-driven refinement process that aligns neural inference with symbolic outcomes, reducing the accumulation of logical discrepancies. Across multiple reasoning benchmarks, eMoT improves accuracy and solution consistency over standard Chain-of-Thought and structured reasoning baselines.On the traditional task Game of 24, eMoT achieves 100% accuracy, surpassing the baseline by up to 17.6%. Evaluations on mathematical task GSM8K, ASDiv, SVAMP, and MGSM further show consistent gains in multi-step mathematical reasoning. In our evaluation, we achieve superior performance despite utilizing a lightweight backbone model with constrained baseline capabilities. Compared to alternative methods that rely on massively scaled models, our results demonstrate that the performance gains are fundamentally driven by the eMoT framework's reasoning control rather than sheer model size.

AI.tldr: 提出eMoT（演化记忆思维）框架，通过将推理轨迹视为动态演化记忆而非静态模板，结合记忆腐蚀、符号锚定和一致性优化三个模块，有效提升大语言模型在多步推理任务中的准确性和稳定性，在Game of 24、GSM8K等基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在多步推理中存在幻觉和数值计算能力不足的问题，根本原因在于标准模型将推理视为一次性生成过程，而非保留和优化成功推理逻辑。
AI.method: 提出eMoT框架，包含三个核心模块：(1)记忆腐蚀机制——增强高效用推理结构并衰减低频结构；(2)符号锚定引擎——利用Python进行确定性计算；(3)一致性驱动优化——对齐神经推理与符号计算结果，减少逻辑偏差累积。
AI.result: Game of 24任务达到100%准确率，超越基线17.6%；在GSM8K、ASDiv、SVAMP、MGSM等数学推理任务上持续提升；使用轻量级模型即取得优于依赖大规模模型方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: eMoT框架的性能提升根本上源于其推理控制机制而非模型规模，证明通过结构化记忆管理和符号-神经对齐可以有效克服LLM在推理中的固有限制。

title: MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?
summary: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

AI.tldr: 提出MMG2Skill-Bench基准和MMG2Skill框架，将网络上的多模态指南转化为智能体可执行的技能，并通过闭环反馈持续优化，在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌任务中显著提升VLM智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 网络上存在大量多模态、异构、噪声化的程序性知识（指南），但这些知识是为人类设计的，难以直接被智能体用于解决长程任务。现有方法缺乏从人类指南到智能体可执行技能的自动化转换与持续改进机制。
AI.method: 提出MMG2Skill闭环框架：(1) 将指南编译为可编辑的结构化技能；(2) 固定VLM智能体在执行时依赖这些技能；(3) 基于轨迹级根因反馈（而非基准分数）修订技能。同时构建MMG2Skill-Bench基准评估该任务。
AI.result: 在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌三类任务中，使用6种VLM骨干网络，MMG2Skill在所有模型-领域组合上均优于基线，宏观平均提升12.8-25.3个百分点。消融实验表明直接使用原始指南会降低性能，结构化技能构建和轨迹驱动修订缺一不可。在可推断成功信号的任务中，分析器驱动的早停可防止性能退化并节省25%-53%的尝试。
AI.conclusion: MMG2Skill有效弥合了人类指南与智能体技能之间的鸿沟，证明了结构化技能编译与轨迹级根因反馈相结合是提升VLM智能体长程任务性能的关键路径。

title: Exploiting In-Sensor Computing for Energy-Efficient Earth Observation
comment: Accepted at the XXIV Annual Conference on Sensors and Microsystems (AISEM) 2026
summary: The rapid growth of the satellite industry has driven a significant increase in geospatial data acquisition, highlighting a critical bottleneck: the severe disparity between the volume of collected sensor data and the limited downlink bandwidth available to ground stations. While On-Board Computing (OBC) has helped address this by pre-processing data in orbit, this article further advances the paradigm by introducing an in-sensor computing framework. We present an optimized end-to-end Earth Observation (EO) pipeline tailored for strict computational constraints by integrating TinyML techniques with the Sony IMX500 Intelligent Vision Sensor. Specifically, our approach shifts processing directly to the sensor level, offloading the computation from the primary embedded device, and effectively mitigating the downlink transmission of noisy or irrelevant data. We evaluated several efficient Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), i.e., SqueezeNet, ShuffleNetV2, and MCUNetV1, on the EuroSAT dataset. Experimental results show that, despite the optimizations required for deployment on the IMX500 platform, our models maintain a competitive 96.68% accuracy while operating within its 8 MB constraints. Specifically, the models reach an average processing throughput of 17.40 FPS with a latency of 27.43 ms. Furthermore, our system profile exhibits high energy efficiency, with a low energy footprint of 14.19 mJ per inference and an efficiency rating of 42.26 GMAC/J, demonstrating its viability for in-sensor deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于索尼IMX500智能视觉传感器的星载计算框架，通过在传感器端直接处理遥感数据，将TinyML技术应用于地球观测任务，在8MB约束下实现96.68%的准确率和17.40 FPS的吞吐量，显著降低星地数据传输压力。
AI.motivation: 卫星产业快速增长导致遥感数据激增，但星地下行链路带宽有限，成为数据处理瓶颈。现有星载计算虽有所缓解，仍需进一步提升，因此提出将计算下沉到传感器级别的方案。
AI.method: 将TinyML技术与索尼IMX500智能视觉传感器结合，构建端到端地球观测管线。在传感器层面直接运行轻量级卷积神经网络（SqueezeNet、ShuffleNetV2、MCUNetV1），在EuroSAT数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在8MB约束下，模型保持96.68%的准确率，平均处理吞吐量17.40 FPS，延迟27.43 ms，每次推理能耗仅14.19 mJ，效率达42.26 GMAC/J。
AI.conclusion: 该传感器内计算框架在严格资源限制下仍保持高性能和高能效，证明其用于星载遥感场景的可行性和有效性，为解决星地数据传输瓶颈提供了新思路。

title: Where Do Deep-Research Agents Go Wrong? Span-Level Error Localization in Agent Trajectories
summary: Deep-research agents solve tasks through long trajectories of search, tool use, evidence inspection, and answer synthesis. Evaluation based on final answers shows whether an agent succeeds, but not which parts of the trajectory make the answer unreliable. We study span-level error localization for deep-research agents. We collect 2,790 real trajectories from two agent frameworks, three backbone models, and three benchmarks, convert raw logs into semantic spans, and annotate harmful error spans through LLM-assisted expert review. From these annotations, we build TELBench, a 1,000-instance benchmark for identifying error spans among normal exploration, failed searches, tentative hypotheses, and harmless noise. We further propose DRIFT, a claim-centric auditing framework that tracks agent claims, checks their support in trajectory evidence, and marks spans where unsupported or conflicting claims affect the answer path. Experiments across model families and auditing frameworks show that DRIFT improves span-level error localization and first-error accuracy by up to 30 percentage points. Our work provides a process-level view of reliability in deep-research agents.

AI.tldr: 针对深度研究智能体在长轨迹执行中的可靠性问题，构建了TELBench基准（含1000个实例），并提出DRIFT审计框架，通过以声明为中心的追踪与证据比对，实现了跨度级错误定位，将首次错误定位准确率提升最多30个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案是否正确，无法揭示轨迹中哪些部分导致答案不可靠，缺乏对深度研究智能体执行过程错误的细粒度定位方法。
AI.method: 收集两个智能体框架、三个骨干模型、三个基准下的2790条真实轨迹，将原始日志转化为语义跨度，通过LLM辅助专家评审标注有害错误跨度，构建TELBench基准；提出DRIFT框架，以声明为中心追踪智能体生成的主张，核验轨迹证据是否支持，标记缺乏支持或存在冲突的跨度。
AI.result: DRIFT在跨度级错误定位和首次错误准确率上相比基线方法提升最多30个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 本文为深度研究智能体的可靠性提供了过程级视角，所提出的DRIFT框架能有效定位执行轨迹中的错误环节。

title: CARTE: A Benchmark for Mapping Language Model Knowledge Across France
summary: We introduce CARTE 1 (Culturally Anchored Regional-Territorial Evaluation), a multiplechoice benchmark for evaluating the ability of large language models (LLMs) to perform fine-grained reasoning over geographically grounded and regionally differentiated knowledge within France. While prior benchmarks focus on national-level cultural understanding, they largely overlook intra-country variation and the need to distinguish between closely related regional contexts. CARTE addresses this gap by introducing 2,431 questions spanning the 13 metropolitan regions of France and covering 14 thematic domains, including culture, language, demographics, economy, environment, and mobility. We further introduce CARTE-LV, a subset targeting Linguistic Variation across French regions, enabling focused evaluation of language-related differences. We evaluate 27 LLMs ranging from 1B to 12B parameters under few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal performance disparities across regions and model scales, suggesting systematic gaps in pretraining coverage and limited robustness to intra-national variation.

AI.tldr: 提出CARTE基准测试，评估大语言模型对法国13个大区14个主题领域（共2,431道选择题）的细粒度区域知识理解能力，发现模型在区域间存在显著性能差异和预训练覆盖盲区。
AI.motivation: 现有文化理解基准主要关注国家层面，忽视了国家内部区域差异以及模型区分相近区域上下文的能力。
AI.method: 构建包含2,431道选择题的CARTE基准，覆盖法国13个大区和14个主题领域；另设CARTE-LV子集聚焦语言变体；评估27个1B-12B参数规模的LLM在少样本设置下的表现。
AI.result: 不同区域和模型规模之间存在性能差异，表明预训练覆盖存在系统性缺口，模型对国内区域变化的鲁棒性有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在国家内部的地域细粒度知识理解上存在不足，CARTE可作为评估和改善这一能力的重要基准。

title: Event-Based Vision in Space: Applications, Trends, and Future Directions
comment: Accepted at the XXIV Annual Conference on Sensors and Microsystems (AISEM) 2026
summary: Earth Observation (EO) is undergoing a significant transformation driven by the deployment of novel sensing technologies. Traditional frame-based optical sensors often struggle with motion blur, high power consumption, and extreme data redundancy in challenging orbital environments. In contrast, event-based sensors, also known as neuromorphic cameras, offer a bio-inspired asynchronous approach. By capturing only local illumination changes, they provide microsecond temporal resolution, an extremely high dynamic range, and exceptional energy efficiency. Although the use of these sensors is rapidly expanding from terrestrial systems to orbital platforms, the scientific literature surrounding their space-based applications remains heavily fragmented. To bridge this gap, this article presents a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art in event-based vision in the space domain. Based on the retrieved literature, we introduce a taxonomy structured around four primary domains: 1) atmospheric and high-speed observation; 2) environmental monitoring and change detection; 3) operational support and onboard processing; and 4) geospatial modeling and predictive analysis. As a result, this survey highlights that neuromorphic engineering is far more than a supplementary imaging technique; it is a paradigm shift that can be used to directly address critical bottlenecks in modern remote sensing and sustainable space exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于事件的神经形态传感器（事件相机）在太空领域的应用现状，将其归纳为四个主要领域：大气与高速观测、环境监测与变化检测、操作支持与星上处理、地理空间建模与预测分析，并指出该技术是解决现代遥感瓶颈的范式转变。
AI.motivation: 传统帧基光学传感器在轨道环境中存在运动模糊、高功耗和数据冗余等问题，而事件传感器虽具有高时间分辨率、高动态范围和能效优势，但其太空应用的相关文献高度碎片化，缺乏系统性综述。
AI.method: 对已检索文献进行系统性综述，构建了一个以四个主要领域为核心的分类体系来组织现有研究。
AI.result: 提出了一个包含四个主要应用领域的分类体系：大气与高速观测、环境监测与变化检测、操作支持与星上处理、地理空间建模与预测分析。
AI.conclusion: 神经形态工程不仅是一种补充性成像技术，更是一种范式转变，可直接应对现代遥感和可持续太空探索中的关键瓶颈问题。

title: BADGER: Bridging Agentic and Deterministic Evaluation for Generative Enterprise Reasoning
summary:
Enterprise AI systems that translate natural language into SQL queries and orchestrate multi-step agentic reasoning pipelines require evaluation approaches fundamentally different from academic benchmarks. Spider and BIRD established execution-accuracy protocols; G-Eval and RAGAS advanced LLM-based assessment; and recent work such as Spider 2.0, BEAVER, and BIRD-Interact has begun to address enterprise and agentic dimensions. No single framework unifies text-to-SQL assessment with agentic behavior evaluation into a production-grade pipeline calibrated against human expert judgment.
  We present BADGER, developed at Merkle, a unified evaluation framework integrating text-to-SQL assessment with agentic behavior evaluation. BADGER offers three contributions. First, LLM-assisted SQL component extraction extending Spider methodology to handle CTE-heavy, dialect-specific SQL. Second, a hybrid execution accuracy metric (Hybrid-EX) resolving column-aliasing and numeric-tolerance brittleness by using an LLM to infer structural alignments before deterministic cell-level scoring. Validated on 150 human-annotated industry queries, Hybrid-EX achieves Cohen's kappa=0.717 [95% CI: 0.600-0.822] (Substantial agreement) and 87.3% balanced accuracy, outperforming all six competing frameworks (Delta-kappa: 0.322-0.502, all p<=0.001). Third, an enterprise agentic evaluation suite assembling RAGAS, G-Eval, and agent benchmark metrics into a unified pipeline; Excess Tool Usage is the sole novel element.
  BADGER runs entirely within the client's governed data environment, supports configurable LLM judge backends, and enables rapid prototyping of client-specific judges and metrics, serving as a continuous evaluation backbone rather than a one-time quality gate.

AI.tldr: BADGER 是一个由 Merkle 开发的统一评估框架，将文本到SQL评估与代理行为评估整合到生产级管道中，支持在客户受控数据环境中运行，并提供了三种主要贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有的评估框架（如Spider、BIRD、G-Eval、RAGAS等）各自独立，缺乏一个能够统一文本到SQL评估与代理行为评估、并针对企业环境校准的生产级框架。
AI.method: BADGER 包含三项核心方法：1) LLM辅助的SQL组件提取，扩展Spider方法以处理CTE密集型、方言特定的SQL；2) 混合执行准确度指标（Hybrid-EX），结合LLM推断结构对齐和确定性单元格评分；3) 企业代理评估套件，整合RAGAS、G-Eval和代理基准指标。
AI.result: Hybrid-EX在150个人工标注的行业查询上验证，Cohen's kappa=0.717（87.3%平衡准确率），优于所有六个竞争框架（Delta-kappa: 0.322-0.502, p<=0.001）。
AI.conclusion: BADGER 作为一个持续评估的骨干系统，而非一次性质量门禁，能够在客户受控数据环境中运行，支持可配置的LLM评判后端，并支持快速原型化特定于客户的评判指标。

title: Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis
summary: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

AI.tldr: GAIS是一个通过两阶段接地机制自动构建多样化环境与复杂任务的框架，在多个基准上显著超越现有方法，具有优秀的数据效率和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有依赖LLM合成智能体数据的方法存在退化为内部先验的随机采样、无法捕捉真实领域的多样性和难度、难以构建高保真长程任务等问题，且人工标注成本过高。
AI.method: 提出两阶段接地机制：1) 协议锚定环境构建：从真实MCP服务器派生环境，确保功能多样性和难度；2) 结构引导规划：在环境中主动施加逻辑依赖和对抗策略，生成复杂任务。
AI.result: 在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上，GAIS合成数据显著优于当前最优基线，使得基础模型能够匹配甚至超越其官方指令微调版本，同时数据效率更高、可扩展性更强。
AI.conclusion: GAIS通过接地合成方式有效解决了现有范式中的退化问题，为通用智能体智能的训练数据规模化提供了可行路径。

title: KG-FairDiff: Knowledge Graph-Guided Prompt Refinement for Demographically Fair Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Text-to-Image (TTI) systems are now everyday infrastructure for journalism, education, advertising, and public communication, and the demographic and cultural stereotypes they inherit from training data (rendering women, people of colour, older adults, and non-Western cultures as under-represented or caricatured) become a population-level harm at deployment scale. Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

AI.tldr: 提出KG-FairDiff，一个无需重新训练的推理时框架，通过知识图谱、LLM重写器和验证器组成闭环管道，在保持语义的同时减少文本到图像生成中的人口统计和种族刻板印象。
AI.motivation: 现有TTI系统在部署规模上会将训练数据中的性别、种族、年龄和文化刻板印象放大为群体级伤害，而现有缓解方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练（不适用于闭源模型），要么依赖忽略文化语境的固定模板。
AI.method: 将公平感知的提示优化形式化为约束优化问题，实现为闭环管道：①包含约1200个文化与偏见相关三元组的知识图谱检索结构化上下文；②LLM重写器提出提示改写；③验证器仅接受降低基于散度的公平性损失且保持语义保真度的改写。
AI.result: 在八个广泛部署的生成器上进行审计，KG-FairDiff在性别、种族、年龄和交叉性差异方面显著降低，同时保持了提示语义。
AI.conclusion: KG-FairDiff提供了一种模型无关、推理时、部署就绪的路径，无需重新训练即可实现更公平的生成式AI。

title: Learning When Not to Act: Mitigating Tool Abuse in Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning can induce tool abuse, where models overuse external tools even for queries solvable by internal reasoning. Existing approaches mitigate this issue with uniform tool-use penalties or hard limits, which reduce tool frequency but may also suppress useful tool-assisted exploration. We propose EAPO, an Efficient Agentic Policy Optimization framework that learns selective tool use. EAPO introduces tool-free trajectories into each rollout group, applies difficulty-aware reward shaping to penalize redundant tool calls mainly on easier queries, and uses confidence-aware token reweighting to improve policy learning. Across nine mathematical and knowledge-intensive reasoning benchmarks, EAPO consistently improves the accuracy efficiency trade-off on Qwen2.5-3B, Qwen2.5-7B, and Llama3.1-8B. Compared with GRPO, EAPO improves average performance by 10.45%, 7.27%, and 9.69%, while reducing average tool calls by 18.33%, 18.33%, and 24.59%, respectively. These results show that agents can learn when not to use tools without compromising tool-integrated reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出EAPO框架，通过无工具轨迹、难度感知奖励和置信度重加权，让智能体学会选择性使用工具，在提升推理性能的同时减少不必要的工具调用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过统一惩罚或硬限制来抑制工具滥用，但可能同时压制了有用的工具辅助探索，需要更精细的控制策略。
AI.method: 1) 在每组rollout中引入无工具轨迹；2) 难度感知奖励塑造，对简单问题惩罚冗余工具调用；3) 置信度感知的token重加权以优化策略学习。
AI.result: 在9个数学和知识密集型推理基准上，相比GRPO，Qwen2.5-3B/7B和Llama3.1-8B平均性能提升10.45%/7.27%/9.69%，工具调用减少18.33%/18.33%/24.59%。
AI.conclusion: 智能体能够学会何时不使用工具，在不损害工具集成推理能力的前提下实现性能与效率的更好权衡。

title: Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables. Methodology paper; illustrative experiments only, no proprietary data
summary: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将含噪音的短文本产品描述映射到消费分类（如COICOP）的方法，采用文本归一化、基于前缀树的规则预分类和逐类别二元确认模型，发现词袋模型即可达到近完美的F1分数（约0.99），约67个标注样本就足够，且可靠性加权投票仅略优于简单多数投票。
AI.motivation: 在消费价格测量中，替代数据源（扫描仪、网络爬虫、交易收据数据）的产品描述通常简短、含噪音且无标准产品代码，需要将每个商品映射到标准消费分类后才能进行价格比较。本文旨在研究这一映射问题的通用、可复现方法。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：（1）文本归一化和分词；（2）基于前缀树的规则预分类器，利用每类关键词和停用词；（3）每类别二元确认模型。采用人在回路中的标注协议，标注者给出二元有效/拒绝判断，通过动态更新的可靠性权重聚合，模型可加入同一循环持续微调。
AI.result: 在受控无泄漏研究中，词袋模型即可达到约0.99的F1分数，线性分类器与多层感知机表现相当，n-gram特征无额外增益，约67个标注样本就足够。可靠性加权投票仅略优于简单多数投票，Dawid-Skene方法在标签恢复上明显更好。
AI.conclusion: 对于产品描述到消费分类的映射任务，简单方法（词袋+线性分类器）已足够有效，无需复杂模型。同时讨论了价格层面质量控制和统计机构使用交易数据的设计经验。

title: Knowledge-Intensive Video Generation
summary: Text-to-video generation has advanced rapidly in visual quality, but remains under-evaluated for factuality and practical usefulness. We introduce knowledge-intensive video generation (KIVI), where models generate videos from short information-seeking prompts that ask for explanations, procedures, or demonstrations. To evaluate this setting, we construct KIVI-Bench, a benchmark of 1,080 prompts, and propose automatic metrics for factuality and helpfulness. Human evaluation shows that our metrics significantly better align with human annotations than existing alternatives. Experiments on seven state-of-the-art video generation models show that current systems still lag behind human performance, especially on visual properties, procedural operations, and clear information presentation. These results highlight KIVI as a challenging direction for factual and instructionally useful video generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务和KIVI-Bench基准，评估视频生成模型在事实性和实用性方面的表现，发现现有模型远落后于人类水平。
AI.motivation: 现有文生视频模型在视觉质量上进步显著，但在事实准确性和实际有用性方面缺乏系统评估，因此需要构建一个评估事实性和知识密度的基准。
AI.method: 提出KIVI任务（从简短信息寻求型提示生成视频），构建包含1,080个提示的KIVI-Bench基准，并设计面向事实性和有用性的自动评估指标。
AI.result: 人类评估表明提出的指标比现有替代方案与人类标注的一致性更高；七个SOTA模型在视觉属性、操作步骤和信息清晰呈现方面均低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: KIVI是一个具有挑战性的方向，当前视频生成系统在事实性和教学实用性上仍存在显著不足，需要进一步改进。

title: S3TS: Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search for Advanced Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Effective scheduling in the energy sector is essential to ensure the reliable operation of electrical grids and their connected assets by, for instance, optimizing the dispatch of generation units and storage systems. An effective planning strategy must (a) accommodate advanced and potentially non-linear system models -- exploiting the increasing data availability of modern grids, and (b) explicitly handle uncertainties arising, for instance, from the integration of renewable energy sources. While existing approaches can address either non-linearity (e.g., Monte Carlo Tree Search) or uncertainty (e.g., stochastic mathematical optimization), there is a lack of planning techniques capable of addressing both challenges simultaneously. To bridge this gap, we propose a Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search (S3TS) algorithm that explicitly represents uncertainty through scenario trees while enabling the integration of advanced non-linear models. We evaluate S3TS on a simulated demand response signal publication problem, largely mimicking the imbalance settlement mechanism in Belgium. The results demonstrate near-optimal performance in linear, analytically tractable settings, with costs within 14% of the mathematically optimal solution conditioned to the scenario trees. In highly non-linear scenarios, S3TS significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving cost reductions of up to 51% and 5.4% compared to a myopic algorithm and deterministic MCTS, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为S3TS的算法，结合场景树与树搜索，同时在电力系统调度中处理非线性模型和不确定性，在非线性场景下成本降低高达51%。
AI.motivation: 现有调度方法要么能处理非线性（如MCTS），要么能处理不确定性（如随机优化），但缺乏同时应对两者的规划技术。
AI.method: 提出随机场景结构化树搜索（S3TS）算法，通过场景树显式表示不确定性，同时集成高级非线性模型。
AI.result: 在线性可解析场景下成本与最优解差距在14%以内；在高度非线性场景下，相比贪心算法和确定性MCTS，成本分别降低51%和5.4%。
AI.conclusion: S3TS能有效桥接非线性建模与不确定性处理的鸿沟，实现电力系统调度的近最优性能。

title: Automated Essay Scoring and Language Certification: Assessing Generalizability, Agreement and Validity for French
summary: In Automated Essay Scoring (AES), benchmarking practices have fostered minimalist evaluation practices, in contrast with the broader-view recommendations of evaluation frameworks, such as the argument-based validation framework (ABV), which argued in favor of a multidimensional assessment of systems, especially in the context of high-stakes language tests. In this paper, we introduce an enhanced and more practical version of the ABV framework, incorporating fairness analysis, correlations with linguistic features, prediction error evaluation, and model agreement compared with human raters. Applying this framework to French AES, we compare 8 model architectures on a corpus of 27k exam essays (2 raters each) and a generalization corpus of 961 essays (at least nine raters each). Our analyses illustrate the benefits of applying the ABV framework to better understand the capabilities and pitfalls of AES models, while also advancing the state-of-the-art for French AES.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个增强版的基于论证的验证框架（ABV），用于更全面地评估自动作文评分系统，并在法语AES任务上对比了8种模型架构，通过公平性分析、语言特征相关性、预测误差评估和人机一致性等多维度分析，揭示了不同模型的能力与局限，同时推进了法语AES的最新水平。
AI.motivation: 当前自动作文评分（AES）领域的基准测试实践过于简化，缺乏对系统多维度的评估。为在高风险语言测试场景中更全面地理解AES系统的能力与缺陷，亟需引入更系统的验证框架。
AI.method: 提出增强版ABV框架，包含公平性分析、语言特征相关性分析、预测误差评估以及与人评分者的一致性比较。在27,000篇考试作文（每篇2位评分者）和961篇泛化语料（每篇至少9位评分者）上，对8种模型架构进行法语AES实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，增强版ABV框架能够有效揭示不同AES模型在多个维度上的能力差异与潜在缺陷，同时该方法在法语AES任务上达到了当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 多维度的ABV评估框架比单一的基准测试更能全面理解AES系统的表现，应成为高风险评估中的标准实践；该框架在法语AES中验证有效并推动了该领域的发展。

title: Beyond Visual Memory: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Recent latent visual reasoning methods achieve substantial gains by inserting continuous latent tokens into multimodal language models. These gains are commonly attributed to the tokens encoding visual evidence; recent analyses, however, reveal a paradox: the tokens are loosely tied to the image and contribute little to the answer. Critically, these analyses treat latent tokens as a single unit, obscuring the true source of the gains. We therefore decompose latent tokens into three testable components: latent slots, boundary markers, and format, and develop a state-of-the-art method as a probe under favorable conditions. Across six method-stage settings and four perception-heavy benchmarks, latent slots fail every prediction of the visual-memory account. Strikingly, retaining only the boundary markers preserves 78 to 100% of the gain in several settings, while the model attends to the image more narrowly at latent positions than at answer positions. The gain therefore comes from boundary markers, format, and this attention pattern, not from latent slots. How each method engages this mechanism depends on its training supervision: at matched accuracy, mechanisms can still differ markedly. Latent visual reasoning thus needs evaluation not only by accuracy but by what the model actually relies on.

AI.tldr: 最新研究表明，多模态语言模型中的潜在视觉推理增益主要来自边界标记、格式和注意力模式，而非视觉记忆，因此需要从依赖机制而非仅准确率来评估模型。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在视觉推理方法通过插入连续潜在标记取得显著增益，但归因分析存在悖论——标记与图像关联弱却贡献小。已有分析将潜在标记视为单一整体，掩盖了真正增益来源。本文旨在分解潜在标记，厘清各成分的实际作用。
AI.method: 将潜在标记分解为三个可测试组件：潜在槽（latent slots）、边界标记（boundary markers）和格式（format）。在有利条件下开发了最先进方法作为探针，在六种方法-阶段设置和四个感知密集型基准上进行实验。
AI.result: 潜在槽在所有预测中均未支持视觉记忆假设；仅保留边界标记即可保留78%-100%的增益；模型在潜在位置比答案位置更窄地关注图像。增益来自边界标记、格式和注意力模式，而非潜在槽。不同训练监督方式会导致相同准确率下机制显著不同。
AI.conclusion: 潜在视觉推理不仅需要评估准确率，还需要评估模型实际依赖的机制。

title: An Abstract Worlds Semantic Framework for Belief Change Operators
summary: This article proposes a set-theoretic framework for belief change, called Abstract Worlds Semantics, in which no logical syntax is assumed. Inspired by Grove's (1988) results, our approach treats worlds as primitive elements, over which world contraction and world revision operators are defined. This semantic framework enables a unified analysis of belief change models. Within this framework, we unify classical and non-prioritized belief change constructions by defining versatile operators. When classical propositional logic is considered, our framework provides a homogeneous account of AGM, KM, and Multiple Change models. In summary, AWS systematizes belief change frameworks and operators, simplifying and generalizing belief change theory over belief sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“抽象世界语义学”（AWS）的集合论信念变更框架，不依赖逻辑语法，将世界视为原始元素，统一了经典与非优先信念变更模型，并简化了AGM、KM和多变更等理论。
AI.motivation: 现有信念变更理论多基于语法假设，缺乏统一语义框架。作者希望消除语法依赖，用纯集合论方法统一不同信念变更模型。
AI.method: 以世界（worlds）为原始元素，定义世界收缩与世界修正算子，在无逻辑语法的集合论框架下构建AWS，并设计通用算子统一经典与非优先信念变更构造。
AI.result: AWS成功统一了AGM、KM和多变更模型，为非优先信念变更提供了同质化分析，简化并泛化了基于信念集的信念变更理论。
AI.conclusion: AWS作为一个无语法假设的语义框架，系统化了信念变更框架与算子，为信念变更理论提供了更简洁、通用的形式化基础。

title: PlanarBench: Evaluating LLM Spatial Reasoning via Planar Graph Drawing
summary:
PlanarBench tests whether LLMs can draw planar graphs as ASCII art given only an edge list -- a spatial reasoning task that resists memorization because edge order, edge orientation, and node labels are all permutable.
  We evaluate 91 models on the 199 simplest non-isomorphic connected planar graphs (2 - 7 vertices).
  Edge count is the dominant difficulty predictor ($r = -0.85$) -- a finding not reported in prior LLM graph benchmarks, which use only node count as the difficulty axis.

AI.tldr: PlanarBench评估LLM将平面图绘制为ASCII艺术的能力，发现边数是主要难度预测因子（r=-0.85），而非传统使用的节点数。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM图基准仅使用节点数作为难度指标，缺乏对边数影响的系统研究。平面图绘制作为空间推理任务，因其可排列性而抵抗记忆，需要更精确的难度评估方法。
AI.method: 在91个模型上测试199个最简单的非同构连通平面图（2-7个顶点），分析边数与模型表现的相关性。
AI.result: 边数是主导性难度预测因子，与模型表现的相关性达到r=-0.85，这是以往研究未报道的发现。
AI.conclusion: 在评估LLM图推理能力时，应同时考虑边数和节点数，边数可能是更有效的难度指标。

title: DeblurNVS: Geometric Latent Diffusion for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Motion-Blurred Images
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a fundamental problem in computer vision and graphics. Recent advances in neural radiance fields (NeRF), 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), and generative view synthesis have substantially improved its quality. Yet most methods still rely on clean observations, where image structures and cross-view geometric cues are well preserved. Motion blur breaks this assumption by corrupting local details and weakening multi-view correspondences. Such blur commonly arises from camera shake, scene motion, or finite exposure in practical capture. Blur-aware NVS methods address this degradation by modeling image formation, but their reliance on costly per-scene optimization limits efficient and generalizable sparse-view synthesis. To address this, we propose DeblurNVS, a novel framework for synthesizing high-fidelity novel views directly from sparse motion-blurred images, without requiring per-scene optimization. DeblurNVS restores the intermediate geometric representations needed for multi-view reasoning, enabling blurred inputs to recover reliable structure and correspondence cues. The restored representations are then combined with target camera information to synthesize the target-view representation and reconstruct a sharp RGB novel view. To enable the large-scale training, we construct a motion-blurred NVS dataset from DL3DV-10K using interpolation-based finite-exposure blur synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeblurNVS outperforms existing baselines on synthetic motion-blur benchmarks and generalizes to real motion-blurred scenes, producing perceptually sharper and structurally more stable novel views while avoiding costly per-scene optimization. Project page: https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/DeblurNVS.

AI.tldr: DeblurNVS 是一个无需逐场景优化的新视图合成框架，能从稀疏运动模糊图像中直接合成高质量清晰新视图，通过恢复中间几何表示实现多视图推理，并基于 DL3DV-10K 构建了运动模糊 NVS 数据集用于大规模训练。
AI.motivation: 现有 NVS 方法（如 NeRF、3DGS）依赖清晰观测，而运动模糊会破坏局部细节和跨视图几何对应。已有的模糊感知方法需要昂贵的逐场景优化，难以实现高效且可泛化的稀疏视图合成。
AI.method: 提出 DeblurNVS 框架，从稀疏运动模糊图像中恢复中间几何表示（结构与对应关系），再结合目标相机信息合成目标视图表示，最终重建清晰的 RGB 新视图。同时构建了基于 DL3DV-10K 的运动模糊 NVS 数据集。
AI.result: 在合成运动模糊基准上优于现有基线方法，并能泛化到真实运动模糊场景，生成更清晰、结构更稳定的新视图，且无需逐场景优化。
AI.conclusion: DeblurNVS 有效解决了运动模糊下的稀疏视图合成问题，实现了高效、可泛化的高质量新视图合成，兼顾了感知锐度与结构稳定性。

title: From Capability Models to Automated Planning: An AAS-Native Approach for Automatic PDDL Generation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE 22nd International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)
summary: Engineers designing production systems need to verify that a given layout supports all required production sequences. Automated planning techniques can answer such questions, but formulating the required planning problems in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) demands specialized expertise that production engineers typically lack. Asset Administration Shells (AAS) have emerged as the standardized Digital Twin for industrial assets in Industry 4.0. We show that AAS capability models, structured using four established Industry 4.0 standards (VDI 3682 for process descriptions, IEC 61360-1 for semantic property qualification, IDTA 02011 for type hierarchies, and IDTA 02016 for instance descriptions), contain sufficient information to generate complete PDDL problems automatically. Unlike prior work that introduced PDDL-specific submodels, our approach derives all planning elements from domain-level descriptions of resource functions, so-called capabilities, allowing engineers to model capabilities without any exposure to PDDL syntax or planning concepts. Our extraction algorithm transforms distributed Multi-AAS architectures into complete PDDL planning problems. We validate the approach on AAS models of a laboratory production system, comparing four layout variants using optimal planning to demonstrate how engineers can systematically explore design trade-offs by modifying the AAS model and regenerating the planning domain

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种方法，能够从Asset Administration Shells（AAS）能力模型中自动生成完整的PDDL规划问题，使生产工程师无需掌握PDDL专业知识即可验证生产系统布局的可行性。
AI.motivation: 生产系统工程师需要验证布局是否支持所有生产序列，但使用PDDL进行自动化规划需要专业知识，而工程师通常缺乏这种技能。
AI.method: 利用AAS能力模型（基于VDI 3682、IEC 61360-1、IDTA 02011和IDTA 02016四个工业4.0标准）中的信息，通过提取算法将分布式多AAS架构自动转换为完整的PDDL规划问题。
AI.result: 在实验室生产系统的AAS模型上进行了验证，通过比较四种布局变体的最优规划，证明了工程师可以通过修改AAS模型并重新生成规划域来系统地探索设计权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需引入PDDL特定子模型，仅从领域级别的资源功能（能力）描述中提取所有规划要素，使工程师能够在完全不接触PDDL语法或规划概念的情况下进行生产系统验证。

title: Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference strategies: 1) Early Exit leverages reliability and redundancy to terminate computation safely when returns diminish, and 2)Test-Time Scaling uses the Confidence Region signal to prioritize converged trajectories. To operationalize these insights, we formulate Confidence Region detection as a sequential change-point detection problem, being the first to apply classical change-point methods to monitor CoT reasoning. Using the Cumulative Sum (CUSUM) algorithm, a statistically optimal change-point detector, we develop a training-free framework for real-time inference control. Experiments show our approach establishes a superior Pareto-frontier for early exit. CUSUM achieves 63.06% accuracy with 11.1% token reduction, outperforming DEER and Dynasor by 3.28% and 4.36% in accuracy respectively. For test-time scaling, CUSUM-weighted voting consistently outperforms self-consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CoT的熵动力学，发现探索-收敛两阶段结构，并基于置信区域的两个关键属性（高可靠性和高冗余）提出了早期退出和测试时扩展两种高效推理策略，利用CUSUM算法实现了无需训练的实时推理控制。
AI.motivation: 揭示CoT推理过程中的熵动力学规律，发现置信区域的关键属性，从而设计更高效、更可靠的推理控制策略。
AI.method: 将置信区域检测建模为序列变点检测问题，采用累积和(CUSUM)算法实现实时推理控制，提出早期退出和测试时扩展两种策略。
AI.result: CUSUM算法在早期退出中达到63.06%准确率，减少11.1% token，优于DEER和Dynasor；CUSUM加权投票在测试时扩展中持续优于自一致性方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于CoT熵动力学的两阶段结构，利用CUSUM检测置信区域可实现训练-free的高效推理控制，在早期退出和测试时扩展场景均建立更优的性能边界。

title: HOLA: Holistic Multi-Modal Alignment for Open-Set 3D Recognition
summary: Open-set 3D recognition requires models that generalize to rare or unseen categories. Recent approaches address this by distilling language-vision knowledge into 3D encoders, typically relying on heavy 2D ViTs and aligning each point cloud with a single image or caption, thus anchoring representations to partial views. We propose aligning each point cloud with multiple images and textual descriptions to capture a more holistic understanding of 3D objects. To realize this idea, it is essential to design a loss function capable of jointly aligning a 3D instance with multiple matched signals, multi-view images and multiple texts, while separating positive aggregation from negative competition. We introduce such a function, termed the decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss. Our formulation enhances the loss's hardness-aware focus on challenging negatives, avoiding the "spotlight crowding" that occurs when many positives share the same softmax with all the negatives. Complementing this, we present a lightweight text adapter applied only to web captions, reducing the domain gap to curated annotations and enabling effective use of large-scale unsupervised text. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art open-vocabulary performance on long-tail benchmarks, yielding substantial zero-shot improvements while sustaining high frame rates.

AI.tldr: 提出解耦多正面对比损失函数，通过将每个点云与多视图图像和多种文本描述对齐，实现开放集3D识别，在长尾基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集3D识别方法通常将每个点云与单一图像或文本对齐，导致表征锚定于局部视角，缺乏对3D对象的整体理解。
AI.method: 1) 解耦多正面对比损失函数，将每个3D实例与多视图图像和多种文本描述联合对齐，同时分离正样本聚合与负样本竞争；2) 轻量级文本适配器，缩小网络文本与人工标注之间的域差距。
AI.result: 在长尾基准上实现SOTA开放词汇性能，零样本能力显著提升，同时保持高帧率。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态对齐和文本域适应，可以有效提升3D开放集识别对稀有/未见类别的泛化能力。

title: CEON: Circular Economy Ontology Network
summary: Increasing the circularity of resource use in our society has been recognized as a path to sustainability, i.e., transitioning into a more circular economy. There are many different circular strategies to do so, such as reusing products and components, refurbishing and remanufacturing used products, or recycling left-over or used materials. To enable these strategies, it is necessary to share information at the infrastructure level and to communicate between industry sectors along the product life cycle. Enabling semantic interoperability in this information sharing and communication is therefore a key to increasing circularity. However, knowledge representation for the circular economy (CE) domain, which involves many relevant industry sectors related to product life cycles, remains challenging. To bridge this gap, we developed the Circular Economy Ontology Network (CEON) within the Onto-DESIDE project. This ontology network aims to fill gaps in CE by defining cross-sectorial concepts and to enable semantics-aware data documentation. We demonstrate CEON through cross-industry data documentation scenarios spanning construction, electronics, and textile sectors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了循环经济本体网络（CEON），旨在通过跨行业语义互操作性提升资源循环利用，并在建筑、电子和纺织领域验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 循环经济需要跨行业、全生命周期的信息共享与语义互操作，但现有知识表示方法难以覆盖多行业交叉的循环经济领域。
AI.method: 在Onto-DESIDE项目中开发了循环经济本体网络（CEON），定义跨行业核心概念，支持语义感知的数据文档化。
AI.result: 通过建筑、电子和纺织三个行业的跨行业数据文档场景，成功验证了CEON的实用性。
AI.conclusion: CEON能够填补循环经济领域跨行业概念定义的空白，是实现语义互操作和提升资源循环利用的关键基础设施。

title: SentGuard: Sentence-Level Streaming Guardrails for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models increasingly stream long, reasoning-intensive responses in real time, making when to moderate as critical as whether to moderate. Existing guardrails fall into two unsatisfactory extremes: response-level methods delay intervention until the full output is generated, whereas token-level methods act on incomplete semantics, often producing unstable decisions and excessive guard invocations. To address this challenge, we propose SentGuard, a sentence-level streaming guardrail that operates in parallel with generation. A lightweight waiting buffer groups streamed tokens into sentence chunks and releases only verified chunks to the user, introducing a small offset that enables SentGuard to assess the current prefix while the target LLM decodes subsequent content. To support this, we construct StreamSafe, a benchmark with structured per-sentence annotations across 8 harm categories, capturing the evolution of safety risks across both reasoning and response segments. We further train SentGuard with a coarse-to-fine objective to detect unsafe intent as soon as it emerges at sentence boundaries. Experiments on 5 safety benchmarks show that SentGuard outperforms existing baselines, detecting 90.5% of unsafe cases within two sentences while maintaining a low streaming false-positive rate of 7.41%.

AI.tldr: SentGuard 是一种在句子级别进行流式安全审查的框架，能在生成过程中实时检测不安全内容，在检测到不安全意图时平均仅需2个句子，且误报率仅为7.41%。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型安全审查方法存在两个极端：响应级方法需要等待完整输出才能检测，延迟过高；token级方法基于不完整语义做出决策，导致不稳定的判断和过多的守卫调用。亟需一种在延迟和准确性之间取得平衡的流式安全审查方案。
AI.method: 提出SentGuard，采用轻量级等待缓冲区将流式token聚合成句子块，仅将验证通过的句子释放给用户。同时构建了StreamSafe基准数据集，包含8个危害类别的逐句注释。训练时使用从粗到细的目标函数，在句子边界检测不安全意图。
AI.result: 在5个安全基准测试中，SentGuard优于现有基线方法，能在2个句子内检测到90.5%的不安全案例，流式误报率仅为7.41%。
AI.conclusion: 句子级别的流式安全审查在延迟和准确性之间取得了有效平衡，SentGuard为长推理链的实时安全监管提供了一种实用方案。

title: ChartArena: Benchmarking Chart Parsing across Languages, Scenarios, and Formats
summary: Charts are a primary medium for conveying quantitative and relational information, yet systematically evaluating chart parsing models remains difficult. Existing benchmarks focus on narrow chart types and leave diagrammatic structures such as flowcharts and mind maps largely unaddressed, while models produce outputs in incompatible formats, and datasets rarely include the printed or hand-drawn images encountered in practice. To address these issues, we introduce ChartArena, a comprehensive bilingual benchmark covering eight chart families spanning both numeric charts and diagrammatic structures, each evaluated across three visual scenarios: digital renderings, printed photos, and hand-drawn photos. The dataset is built via a human-agent collaborative annotation pipeline with multi-stage human verification to ensure annotation reliability. To enable fair cross-model comparison, we further design a format-agnostic evaluation protocol that maps heterogeneous outputs into two canonical semantic spaces, a normalized triple view and a directed graph view, and scores them with structure-aware metrics. Through extensive evaluation of 26 leading MLLMs, we observe three consistent findings: (i) frontier proprietary models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro lead overall, yet the strongest open-source systems are rapidly closing the gap; (ii) document parsing models handle numeric charts reasonably but fall sharply behind on diagrammatic structures; and (iii) expert chart parsers remain limited to narrow chart families. Across all models, radar charts and hand-drawn scenarios stay especially challenging. These findings show that ChartArena exposes clear capability gaps and provides a unified foundation for future progress. ChartArena is publicly available at https://github.com/pspdada/ChartArena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChartArena，一个涵盖8种图表家族、3种视觉场景（数字渲染/打印/手绘）的双语基准，通过格式无关评估协议对26个多模态大模型进行评测，发现前沿闭源模型领先但开源模型快速追赶，文档解析模型在图表结构上表现不佳，专家模型局限于窄领域。
AI.motivation: 现有基准图表类型狭窄，缺乏流程图、思维导图等图表结构；模型输出格式不兼容；数据集缺少打印/手绘等实际场景图像。需要统一的评估框架来系统衡量图表解析能力。
AI.method: 构建包含8类图表家族（数值图+图表结构）的双语数据集，覆盖3种视觉场景；采用人机协作标注+多阶段人工验证；设计格式无关评估协议，将异构输出映射到标准化三元组视图和有向图视图，并使用结构感知指标评分。
AI.result: 评估26个MLLMs发现：(i) Gemini 3.1 Pro等前沿闭源模型领先，但最强开源模型快速追赶；(ii) 文档解析模型处理数值图尚可，图表结构上落后明显；(iii) 专家图表解析器局限于窄领域。雷达图和手绘场景对所有模型最具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: ChartArena揭示了现有模型在图表解析上的能力差距，为未来进步提供了统一基础框架。数据集已公开。

title: POIROT: Interrogating Agents for Failure Detection in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Orchestrating Large Language Models into Multi-Agent Systems (LLM-MAS) has unlocked remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet emergent failures and hallucinations that resist characterisation block their deployment in safety-critical domains -- a gap made legally untenable by emerging AI regulation. Existing evaluation paradigms share a common flaw: centralised judgment creates single points of failure and demands domain-specific expertise. Here we present POIROT, a protocol that repurposes a system's own agents as its diagnostic layer, leveraging the epistemic diversity already present in the architecture. Across evaluated settings, POIROT outperforms single-LLM evaluator baselines, with gains that scale with problem complexity (OR = 1.60, $p = 0.008$), agent count, and fault dimensionality, persisting under compound fault conditions. These results demonstrate that safety oversight need not be externalised: the agents executing a role carry sufficient collective intelligence to audit it. We release POIROT as an open-source library alongside BLAME, a benchmark for fault attribution in safety-critical multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: POIROT是一种利用多智能体系统自身智能体进行诊断和故障归因的协议，在安全性评估中优于传统单LLM评估器，且随问题复杂度、智能体数量和故障维度增加而效果更佳。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在安全关键领域部署面临故障和幻觉难以表征的问题，而传统集中式评估范式存在单点故障和需领域专业知识等缺陷。
AI.method: 提出POIROT协议，将系统自身智能体重新用作诊断层，利用架构中已有的认知多样性进行故障检测与归因。
AI.result: POIROT在所有评估场景中优于单LLM评估基线，性能增益随问题复杂度(OR=1.60, p=0.008)、智能体数量和故障维度增加而提升，且在复合故障条件下保持有效。
AI.conclusion: 安全监督不必外部化：执行角色的智能体拥有足够的集体智能来进行审计。同时开源了POIROT库和BLAME基准。

title: DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding
summary: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.

AI.tldr: 本文提出\modelname模型，通过轻量级逐层融合机制替代DFlash的单一融合表示，使每个草稿层可独立关注目标模型的多个层，从而扩展草稿模型容量，在多个基准上实现平均5.52x、5.46x和3.91x的加速，较DFlash提升约5-11%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法DFlash将所有草稿层约束在单一融合表示中，仅利用少数目标层信息，限制了逐层表达能力和草稿容量的进一步扩展。
AI.method: 提出\modelname，采用轻量级逐层融合机制：每个草稿层独立关注一组目标层（可学习组合），注入更丰富的目标模型知识，同时保持极低的额外开销。训练数据从80万扩展到240万样本以充分利用扩大后的容量。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和对话等六个基准上，对Qwen3-4B实现5.52x加速，Qwen3-8B实现5.46x加速，GPT-OSS-20B实现3.91x加速，相比DFlash分别提升约11%、8%和5%。
AI.conclusion: \modelname通过逐层融合机制有效突破了DFlash的瓶颈，实现了更优的块扩散推测解码加速效果，且支持更深的草稿模型架构。

title: Diamonds in the Sky: Pareidolic Animals in Clouds
summary: People often see animal shapes in clouds, a phenomenon known as pareidolia. We propose an AI-based method that aims to predict which animals people are likely to perceive in clouds, even though state-of-the-art recognition methods typically fail to detect such animals. Additionally, we introduce a method to assist individuals in perceiving specific pareidolic animals, even if they did not recognize them initially. Our approach uses a diffusion model to transform cloud segments into an animal shape that visually resemble the original cloud. This diffusion technique is inspired by the observation that the diffusion process succeeds only when the target animal resembles the shape of the cloud, and that subtle visual hints often suffice to help individuals recognize specific pareidolic animals. A generated image, successfully derived from the diffusion model, is then used to predict the pareidolic animal. Additionally, a short morphing video transitioning from the generated image back to the original cloud segment is employed to further enhance the human's perception of the pareidolic animals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的方法，既能预测人们可能从云朵中感知到的动物（空想性视错觉），又能通过生成相似形状的动物图像和变形视频，帮助人们识别原本未注意到的错觉动物。
AI.motivation: 人们常从云朵中看到动物形状（空想性视错觉），但现有最先进的识别方法通常无法检测到这类动物，因此需要一种方法来自动预测人们可能感知到的动物，并辅助人们更好地识别这些错觉。
AI.method: 使用扩散模型将云朵片段转换为与原始云朵视觉上相似的动物形状，只有当目标动物与云朵形状相似时扩散过程才能成功；利用成功生成的图像预测空想性视错觉动物；并制作从生成图像回到原始云朵片段的变形视频，以增强人类对错觉动物的感知。
AI.result: 扩散模型成功生成了与云朵形状相似的动物图像，基于此可以预测人们可能看到的动物；变形视频进一步帮助人类感知原本未注意到的空想性视错觉动物。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅能预测云朵中的错觉动物，还能通过视觉提示帮助人们识别它们，为人机交互中的视觉感知研究提供了新思路。

title: Repair Before Veto: Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning for Contextual Decisions
summary: Hard constraints are usually treated as terminal vetoes: once a candidate violates a requirement, the learned rule rejects it and any repair is handled outside the decision semantics. This misses a common deployed regime in which the system already knows a finite menu of modifications, such as adding a ticket option, changing a configuration, or requesting an available service upgrade. Existing constraint-learning, soft-relaxation, and recourse methods address nearby problems, but they do not learn whether an option should be repaired before being vetoed. We introduce Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning (RACL), a contextual decision framework that lifts known repair operators into the classifier semantics. A candidate is accepted when an affordable repair makes it feasible and preferred enough; otherwise the system returns a structured rejection credit and, when applicable, a repair plan. This repair-before-veto view strictly generalizes no-repair HASSLE-style semantics, reveals an irreducible false-veto gap for terminal-veto rules, separates binary-label non-identifiability from decision-rule learnability, and gives capacity and calibration bounds for the observed-feasibility shared-weight setting. Across controlled and DB1B-derived benchmarks, RACL recovers the intended credit and repair structure. On the hardest raw-data-derived tier, validation-selected RACL reduces false vetoes to 10/4039 (FVR 0.0025), versus about 1064/4039 for the strongest repair-search black-box baseline, while making the FVR/EDR trade-off explicit.

AI.tldr: 提出了修复增强约束学习（RACL）框架，将已知修复操作融入分类器语义，实现"先修复再否决"的决策机制，显著降低了错误否决率。
AI.motivation: 现有硬约束学习方法将违反规则的情况直接否决，但实际系统中存在已知的修改选项（如改配置、升级服务等），当前方法无法学习是否应先修复再否决。
AI.method: 提出RACL框架，将修复操作提升到分类器语义层面。系统评估候选方案是否可通过可负担的修复变得可行且足够偏好，否则返回结构化拒绝信用和修复计划。
AI.result: 在DB1B基准测试中最难层级上，RACL将错误否决降至10/4039（FVR 0.0025），而最强的修复搜索黑基线约为1064/4039，并明确展示了FVR/EDR权衡。
AI.conclusion: RACL框架严格推广了无修复的HASSLE语义，揭示了终端否决规则存在不可约的错误否决差距，并分离了二分类非可识别性与决策规则可学习性。

title: The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification
comment: 8 pages not including references and appendices, 3 figures
summary: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过解耦输入模糊性与不确定性量化信号，利用门控专家和选择性预测方法，显著提升大语言模型在问答任务中的错误预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化指标在错误预测时无法区分模型不确定性（认知不确定性）和输入本身的模糊性（偶然不确定性），导致预测不准确。
AI.method: 采用门控专家（Gated Experts）和选择性预测（Selective Prediction）方法，将黄金标准和预测的模糊性标签融入错误预测流程，解耦输入模糊性与UQ信号。
AI.result: 在六个UQ指标上验证，模糊信息能显著提升错误预测分数，对标准数据集上单个UQ指标PRR提升超过10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 解耦输入模糊性能有效改善LLM在QA任务中的错误预测能力，该方法跨模型家族、训练与评估范式、数据集均有效。

title: Training-free image inversion for one-step diffusion models
summary: In this work, we introduce a novel training-free inversion (TFinv) framework for one-step diffusion models,addressing key challenges in real image inversion and editing. We first identify two critical factors hamperingreal-image inversion and editing: (1) Initial Latent Editability, which is related to the distance between theinitial noise and the ideal Gaussian distribution, and (2) Caption Gap, which means the alignment betweentext captions and image representations. Both factors influence inversion efficiency and the editability ofone-step diffusion models. Then, we propose two novel techniques: iterative noise alignment (iterNA), whichminimizes the distribution gap to align with the normal Gaussian distribution, and suffix learning (suffL),which enhances text-to-image caption alignment by introducing learned suffix prompt tokens. These techniquesenable precise inversion of input images into their initial noise representations and facilitate image editing.Furthermore, we propose a mask-based editing technique for localized edits while preserving backgroundintegrity. Comprehensive experiments on the PIE-Bench dataset validate that our method TFinv not onlyachieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step diffusion editing, but also significantly outperforms existingmultistep approaches in efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/tttao-uwu/TFinv.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TFinv的无训练逆变换框架，用于一步扩散模型的真实图像逆变换和编辑，通过迭代噪声对齐（iterNA）和后缀学习（suffL）技术解决了初始潜在可编辑性和标题差距两个关键问题，实现了最先进的编辑性能并显著优于多步方法。
AI.motivation: 现有一步扩散模型在真实图像逆变换和编辑中存在两个关键挑战：1）初始潜在可编辑性——初始噪声与理想高斯分布之间的距离影响编辑能力；2）标题差距——文本描述与图像表示之间的对齐不足。这两个因素限制了逆变换效率和可编辑性。
AI.method: 提出TFinv框架，包含三种关键技术：1）迭代噪声对齐（iterNA）——最小化分布差距以使噪声对齐标准高斯分布；2）后缀学习（suffL）——引入可学习的后缀提示令牌以增强文本-图像标题对齐；3）基于掩码的编辑技术——实现局部编辑同时保持背景完整性。
AI.result: 在PIE-Bench数据集上的全面实验表明，TFinv在一阶扩散编辑中达到了最先进的性能，并且在效率上显著优于现有的多步方法。
AI.conclusion: TFinv通过无训练的方式有效解决了真实图像逆变换和编辑中的关键瓶颈，为一步扩散模型的实际应用提供了高效准确的解决方案。

title: Forget Attention: Importance-Aware Attention Is All You Need
summary: Combining attention's global retrieval with the sequential importance signal of state space models (SSMs) is the open challenge of hybrid language modeling. Transformers see everywhere but cannot prioritize; SSMs know what matters but cannot revisit. Existing hybrids -- Jamba (block level) and Hymba (head level) -- place the two in separate compartments, so neither informs the other during the attention computation itself. We propose SISA (SSM-Informed Softmax Attention), which adds an SSM-derived importance term directly inside the attention score and realizes the full operation as a single SDPA call on augmented query/key vectors -- no recurrent state, no custom kernel. At 152M / 5B tokens, SISA reaches LAMBADA-greedy 17.3% (vs. Transformer 13.9 and Mamba-3 15.5) and attains NIAH 100% from step 1K, 7x faster than Transformer's retrieval convergence; at 369M, Mamba-3 leads LAMBADA while SISA preserves perfect NIAH and stock-SDPA execution. SISA thus defines a third design axis for SSM-attention hybrids -- score-level fusion -- beyond the block-level and head-level paradigms that have dominated the field.

AI.tldr: SISA是一种在注意力分数内部融入SSM重要性信号的混合语言模型方法，通过单次SDPA调用实现，无需循环状态或自定义核函数，在长程检索和语言理解任务上表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有混合模型（如Jamba、Hymba）将Transformer和SSM放在不同模块或不同注意力头中，两者在注意力计算时彼此孤立，无法在分数层面相互影响。作者希望实现更细粒度的融合。
AI.method: 提出SSM-Informed Softmax Attention (SISA)，将SSM导出的重要性信号直接注入注意力分数内部，通过增强的query/key向量在单次SDPA调用中完成全部计算，无需自定义核或循环状态。
AI.result: 152M/5B词元规模下，LAMBADA-greedy达17.3%（Transformer 13.9, Mamba-3 15.5）；NIAH从第1K步即达100%，检索收敛速度比Transformer快7倍；369M规模下Mamba-3在LAMBADA领先，SISA保持完美NIAH且兼容标准SDPA。
AI.conclusion: SISA定义了SSM-注意力混合的第三种设计轴——分数级融合，超越了以往的块级和头级范式。

title: PortBERT: Navigating the Depths of Portuguese Language Models
summary: Transformer models dominate modern NLP, but efficient, language-specific models remain scarce. In Portuguese, most focus on scale or accuracy, often neglecting training and deployment efficiency. In the present work, we introduce PortBERT, a family of RoBERTa-based language models for Portuguese, designed to balance performance and efficiency. Trained from scratch on over 450 GB of deduplicated and filtered mC4 and OSCAR23 from CulturaX using fairseq, PortBERT leverages byte-level BPE tokenization and stable pre-training routines across both GPU and TPU processors. We release two variants, PortBERT base and PortBERT large, and evaluate them on ExtraGLUE, a suite of translated GLUE and SuperGLUE tasks. Both models perform competitively, matching or surpassing existing monolingual and multilingual models. Beyond accuracy, we report training and inference times as well as fine-tuning throughput, providing practical insights into model efficiency. PortBERT thus complements prior work by addressing the underexplored dimension of compute-performance tradeoffs in Portuguese NLP. We release all models on Huggingface and provide fairseq checkpoints to support further research and applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了PortBERT，一个面向葡萄牙语的RoBERTa系列模型，在超过450GB数据上训练，平衡了性能与效率，在ExtraGLUE基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语NLP中缺乏高效且针对语言特点的模型，现有工作多关注精度或规模，忽视了训练和部署效率。
AI.method: 基于RoBERTa架构，使用字节级BPE分词，在450GB+的mC4和OSCAR23（来自CulturaX）数据上训练，支持GPU和TPU训练，发布base和large两个版本。
AI.result: 在ExtraGLUE基准上，PortBERT base和large匹配或超越了现有单语和多语言模型，同时报告了训练时间、推理时间和微调吞吐量等效率指标。
AI.conclusion: PortBERT通过关注计算-性能权衡，弥补了葡萄牙语NLP中效率维度的空白，模型和checkpoint已开源。

title: PAI-Studio: Cinematic Video Background Replacement with Camera-Aware Motion
summary: We present PAI-Studio, a new reference-conditioned video synthesis task that addresses a long-standing challenge in cinematic background replacement: generating dynamic backgrounds aligned with foreground motion while preserving foreground identity, matching reference scene appearance, and achieving globally consistent illumination with realistic foreground relighting. Existing open-source systems and commercial APIs cannot simultaneously ensure motion-consistent background generation, high-fidelity foreground relighting and foreground identity preservation, often resulting in static backgrounds, inconsistent boundaries, and noticeable compositing artifacts. To bridge this gap, we build upon a Diffusion Transformer video backbone and reformulate the problem as an in-context conditional generation task. Through bidirectional attention, our model jointly captures foreground dynamics and background reference information within a unified architecture.
